summary_zh: 本研究通过实验和数值模拟，探究多孔介质对翼型前缘噪声的降噪机理，重点分析多孔材料对来流湍流特性的影响。结果表明，多孔设计能有效衰减速度脉动，尤其是法向分量，降低滞止区湍动能，并在低频段实现噪声抑制，与快速畸变理论预测一致。
method: 实验（热线风速仪、声束形成）与数值模拟（大涡模拟）结合，对比多孔NACA-0024翼型与实心翼型在圆柱尾流湍流中的响应。
innovation: 揭示了多孔材料通过湍流畸变效应（而非单纯吸声）衰减法向速度脉动，从而降低前缘噪声的物理机制，并利用快速畸变理论进行解释。
conclusions: 1. 多孔材料使法向速度脉动均方根显著衰减，滞止区湍动能大幅降低；2. 噪声降低主要发生在低频范围，与湍流速度功率谱的低频衰减一致。
limitations: 仅针对特定多孔材料（三聚氰胺泡沫）和单一翼型（NACA-0024），未考虑多孔材料参数优化及实际发动机环境。
relevance_reason: 论文研究多孔材料对前缘噪声的降噪机理，与风扇/压气机叶片流致振动控制有间接参考价值，但未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Acoustic scattering by cascades with complex boundary conditions: compliance, porosity and impedance
abstract: We present a solution for the scattered field caused by an incident wave interacting with an infinite cascade of blades with complex boundary conditions. This extends previous studies by allowing the blades to be compliant, porous or satisfying a generalised impedance condition. Beginning with the convected wave equation, we employ Fourier transforms to obtain an integral equation amenable to the Wiener--Hopf method. This Wiener--Hopf system is solved using a method that avoids the factorisation of matrix functions. The Fourier transform is inverted to obtain an expression for the acoustic potential function that is valid throughout the entire domain. We observe that the principal effect of complex boundary conditions is to perturb the zeros of the Wiener--Hopf kernel, which correspond to the duct modes in the inter-blade region. We focus efforts on understanding the role of porosity, and present a range of results on sound transmission and generation. The behaviour of the duct modes is discussed in detail in order to explain the physical mechanisms behind the associated noise reductions. In particular, we show that cut-on duct modes do not exist for arbitrary porosity coefficients. Conversely, the acoustic modes are unchanged by modifications to the boundary conditions. Consequently, we observe that even modest values of porosity can result in reductions in the sound power level of $5$ dB for the first mode and $20$ dB for the second mode. The solution is essentially analytic (the only numerical requirements are matrix inversion and root finding) and is therefore extremely rapid to compute.
affiliations: University of Cambridge
Department of Applied Mathematics and Theoretical Physics, Centre for Mathematical Sciences, University of Cambridge, UK
summary_zh: 针对无限叶栅中叶片具有柔性、多孔或阻抗边界条件的声散射问题，采用Wiener-Hopf方法求解对流波动方程，获得全域解析声势函数。发现多孔边界主要扰动叶间通道的模态零点，导致截止模态消失，可实现第一模态降噪5 dB、第二模态降噪20 dB。
method: 理论解析：基于对流波动方程，利用傅里叶变换和Wiener-Hopf方法求解，仅需矩阵求逆和求根，计算极快。
innovation: 将叶片边界条件从刚性推广到柔性、多孔和阻抗，并采用避免矩阵分解的Wiener-Hopf求解方法，揭示了多孔边界对叶间模态的调控机制。
conclusions: 多孔边界可消除截止模态，第一模态降噪5 dB，第二模态降噪20 dB；声学模态不受边界条件改变影响。
limitations: 仅考虑无限叶栅和线性声学，未涉及非定常流动与结构耦合。
relevance_reason: 论文研究叶片阻抗边界对声散射的影响，与通过声学阻抗调控抑制NSV相关，但未直接涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Modeling Axisymmetric Centrifugal Compressor Characteristics From First Principles
abstract: Abstract Turbochargers are a vital component for aiding engine manufacturers in meeting the latest emissions standards. However, their range of operation is limited for low mass flows by compressor surge. Operation in surge results in pressure and mass flow oscillations that are often damaging to the compressor and its installation. Since surge is a highly complex flow regime, full unsteady three-dimensional models are generally too computationally expensive to run. The majority of current low-dimensional surge models use a cubic compressor characteristic that needs to be fitted to experimental data. Therefore, each time a compressor is studied using these models, costly experimental testing is required. In this paper, a new technique for obtaining an axisymmetric centrifugal compressor characteristic is presented. This characteristic is built using the equations of mass, momentum, and energy from first principles in order to provide a more complete model than those currently obtained via experimental data. This approach enables us to explain the resulting cubic-like shape of the characteristic and hence to identify impeller inlet stall as a route into surge. The characteristic is used within a quasi-steady, map-based surge model in order to demonstrate its ability to predict the onset of surge while only providing geometric data as input. Validation is provided for this model by a discussion of the qualitative flow dynamics and a good fit to experimental data, especially for low impeller speeds and pressure ratios.
affiliations: University of Bath
Department of Mathematical Sciences, University of Bath, Claverton Down, Bath BA2 7AY, UK
Department of Mechanical Engineering, University of Bath, Claverton Down, Bath BA2 7AY, UK
Simon Fraser University
School of Sustainable Energy Engineering, Simon Fraser University, University Drive, Surrey V3T 0N1, BC, Canada
summary_zh: 本文提出一种基于第一性原理的轴流离心压气机特性建模方法，利用质量、动量和能量方程构建轴对称特性，识别叶轮进口失速为喘振路径，并在准稳态图谱喘振模型中验证了其预测能力，定性流动动力学和实验数据吻合良好。
method: 理论建模结合准稳态图谱喘振模型，输入几何数据预测喘振起始，通过实验数据验证。
innovation: 从第一性原理构建压气机特性，无需实验拟合，解释特性立方形状并识别失速路径。
conclusions: 1. 叶轮进口失速是喘振的路径；2. 模型在低叶轮转速和压比下与实验数据吻合良好。
limitations: 仅针对轴流离心压气机，未涉及非定常三维效应或旋转不稳定性。
relevance_reason: 论文研究喘振建模，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但稳定性建模方法有参考价值。

title: Spanwise Variations in Aerodynamic Damping of an Oscillating Annular Compressor Cascade
abstract: Aeroelastic instability in turbomachinery is one of the severe problems limiting its performance. Of particular interest is the phenomenon of stall flutter in compressors, which occurs when blades encounter large incidence flows. With the objective to understand the aerodynamics associated with stall flutter, the present experimental study is conducted on a subsonic annular compressor cascade. Five consecutive blades are oscillated, with the central blade instrumented for unsteady surface pressure measurements. The flow incidence is established using inlet guide vanes to provide three inflow profiles, representative of nominal, near-stall, and poststall incidences. With the blades oscillating at specific interblade phase angles and reduced frequencies, the stability of the cascade is determined globally and locally in terms of aerodynamic damping. The near-hub flow is distinctive due to the thickened boundary layer, resulting in an irregular variation of pressure with low magnitudes, eventually approaching negative stability. At larger incidences, due to the low-amplitude fluctuations in pressure at all spans, the overall stability is reduced. The present work also describes and rationalizes the nature of the dependence of blade unsteady pressure distribution on reduced frequency and incidence.
affiliations: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur
Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur, Kanpur 208 016, Uttar Pradesh, India
summary_zh: 本研究通过实验测量亚声速环形压气机叶栅中振荡叶片的气动阻尼，重点关注失速颤振。在名义、近失速和失速后三种来流攻角下，测量了五片振荡叶片的非定常表面压力，分析了展向气动阻尼变化。发现近轮毂处因边界层增厚导致压力波动不规则且幅值低，最终出现负阻尼；大攻角下全展向压力波动幅值低，整体稳定性降低。
method: 实验研究，在亚声速环形压气机叶栅上，通过进口导叶设置三种来流攻角（名义、近失速、失速后），使五片叶片以特定叶间相位角和折合频率振荡，测量中央叶片非定常表面压力。
innovation: 揭示了展向气动阻尼的差异，特别是近轮毂处边界层增厚导致负阻尼的机制，并系统分析了折合频率和攻角对非定常压力分布的影响。
conclusions: 1. 近轮毂处因边界层增厚，压力波动不规则且幅值低，最终出现负稳定性。2. 大攻角下全展向压力波动幅值低，整体稳定性降低。
limitations: 仅针对亚声速环形叶栅，未涉及跨声速或超声速工况；未考虑旋转不稳定性等非同步振动。
tags: 风扇/压气机叶片气动弹性
relevance_reason: 论文研究压气机叶栅失速颤振（气动弹性），与RI-NSV同属非定常流动诱导振动，但未直接涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Nonlinear dynamic behavior of a flexible asymmetric aero-engine rotor system in maneuvering flight
abstract: Aero-engine rotor systems installed in aircraft are considered to have a base motion. In this paper, a flexible asymmetric rotor system is modeled considering the nonlinear supports of ball bearings and Squeeze Film Dampers (SFDs), and the dynamic characteristics of the rotor system under maneuvering flight are systematically studied. Effects of the translational accelerative motions, the angular motions and the pitching flight with combined translational and angular motions on nonlinear dynamic behavior of the rotor system are investigated. The results show that, due to the nonlinear coupled effects among the rotor, ball bearings and SFDs, within the first bending resonance region, responses of the rotor show obvious nonlinear characteristics such as bistable phenomenon, amplitude jumping phenomenon and non-synchronous vibration. Translational acceleration motion of the aircraft leads to axis offset of the rotor system and thus results in the reduction and the final disappearance of the bistable rotating speed region. The pitching angular motion mainly affects rotational vibration of the rotor system, and thus further induces their transverse vibrations. For the pitching flight with combined translational and angular motions, a critical flight parameter is found to correspond to the conversion of two steady responses of the rotor system, in which one response displays small amplitude and synchronous vibration, and the other shows large amplitude and non-synchronous vibration.
affiliations: Tianjin University
Department of Mechanics, Tianjin University, Tianjin 300354, China
National Demonstration Center for Experimental Mechanics Education, Tianjin University, Tianjin 300354, China
Tianjin Key Laboratory of Nonlinear Dynamics and Control, Tianjin 300354, China
summary_zh: 针对机动飞行下柔性非对称航空发动机转子系统，建立了考虑球轴承和挤压油膜阻尼器非线性支撑的动力学模型，研究了平动加速、俯仰角运动及组合运动对非线性行为的影响。发现一阶弯曲共振区内存在双稳态、振幅跳跃和非同步振动，平动加速度导致双稳态区域缩小消失，俯仰角运动诱发横向振动，组合运动下存在临界飞行参数对应两种稳态响应转换。
method: 数值仿真，采用非线性球轴承和挤压油膜阻尼器模型，研究平动加速、俯仰角运动及组合运动工况下的转子动力学响应。
innovation: 首次系统研究了机动飞行中平动与俯仰组合运动对柔性非对称转子非线性动力学的影响，发现了临界飞行参数下同步与非同步振动稳态转换现象。
conclusions: 1. 一阶弯曲共振区内出现双稳态、振幅跳跃和非同步振动。2. 平动加速度导致双稳态转速区域缩小直至消失，俯仰角运动主要影响旋转振动并诱发横向振动。
limitations: 未考虑叶片气动弹性耦合，仅针对转子结构动力学，未涉及风扇/压气机流致振动。
relevance_reason: 论文研究转子系统非同步振动，但对象为航空发动机转子结构动力学，未涉及风扇/压气机流致振动或RI-NSV机理。

title: Effects of Nonuniform Blade Spacing on Compressor Rotor Forced Response and Aeroacoustics
abstract: A generalized flat plate cascade model is developed in this study to predict the unsteady aerodynamics of a blade row with circumferentially nonuniform spacing in subsonic compressible flow. With no constraints on symmetry, this model can be applied to a blade row with any user-specified nonuniform blade spacing pattern. The effect of nonuniform blade spacing on compressor rotor forced response and aeroacoustic behavior is demonstrated by applying this model to case studies based on the geometry and flow conditions of the Purdue 3-Stage Axial Compressor. The results show that nonuniform blade spacing can greatly alter the blade unsteady loading and spread the acoustic energy to a broader frequency range.
affiliations: Purdue University West Lafayette
Purdue University, West Lafayette, Indiana 47907
summary_zh: 本研究开发了一个广义平板叶栅模型，用于预测亚声速可压缩流中周向非均匀间距叶排的非定常气动特性。通过应用于普渡三级轴流压气机的案例，发现非均匀叶片间距能显著改变叶片非定常载荷，并将声能分散到更宽的频率范围。
method: 数值方法：广义平板叶栅模型，基于普渡三级轴流压气机的几何与流动条件进行案例研究。
innovation: 开发了无对称约束的广义平板叶栅模型，可处理任意指定的非均匀叶片间距模式，并首次系统评估其对强迫响应和声学的影响。
conclusions: 非均匀叶片间距可大幅改变叶片非定常载荷；声能被分散到更宽的频率范围，有助于降低特定频率的响应峰值。
limitations: 模型为平板叶栅，未考虑真实三维效应和粘性；仅针对亚声速条件。
tags: 叶片流致振动预测模型
relevance_reason: 论文研究非均匀叶片间距对强迫响应和声学的影响，与RI-NSV机理无直接关联，但涉及叶片振动和声学调控，对理解非同步振动有参考价值。

title: Effect of Rotation on Leakage and Windage Heating in Labyrinth Seals With Honeycomb Lands
abstract: Abstract One of the basic assumptions of the traditional labyrinth seal leakage calculation is that rotation has minimal or no effect on seal leakage. With the advancement of gas turbine technology, to achieve high performance, seals are run at tight clearances and very high rotational speeds. Due to tight clearances and high speeds, the temperature rise across the seal can be very significant in reducing the seal flow due to the Raleigh line effect. The influence of rotation on the flow dynamics inside the seal region has not previously been studied in detail. In this study the effect of rotation is studied for smooth and honeycomb cells at various seal clearances and rotational speeds. The main objective of this study is to understand the influence of rotation on seal leakage. However, the effect of rotation on swirl and windage heating is also investigated. For this study, the author leveraged the validated 3D computational fluid dynamics methodology for a stationary and rotating labyrinth from previous studies. However, before performing studies on rotation, the numerical modeling approach is benchmarked against experimental data on rotation with smooth stator lands by Waschka et al. The numerical predictions show good agreement with the experimental data. As the rotational speed increases, seal discharge coefficient remains constant until a critical rotational speed is reached. This critical speed is shown to depend non-dimensionally on the ratio of Taylor number to Reynolds number (Ta/Re). As Ta/Re increases above 0.1, seal discharge coefficient can reduce by up to 25% depending on the seal clearance, fin tip speed, and honeycomb cell size.
affiliations: Thermo-fluids Specialist, Systems Design, Rolls-Royce India Pvt. Ltd., Manyata Embassy Business Park, Bangalore, Karnataka 560045, India
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本研究通过三维CFD方法，研究了旋转对光滑和蜂窝面迷宫密封泄漏及风阻加热的影响。发现当泰勒数与雷诺数之比超过0.1时，密封流量系数可降低高达25%，揭示了旋转对密封性能的关键作用。
method: 采用已验证的三维CFD方法，针对不同密封间隙和转速进行数值模拟，并与Waschka等人的旋转实验数据对比验证。
innovation: 首次详细研究了旋转对迷宫密封内部流动动力学的影响，特别是蜂窝面结构下的泄漏和风阻加热效应。
conclusions: 1. 转速增加时，密封流量系数在达到临界转速前保持不变；2. 当Ta/Re>0.1时，流量系数最多降低25%。
limitations: 研究仅限于特定几何和工况，未涉及非定常流动或气动弹性效应。
relevance_reason: 论文研究旋转对密封泄漏的影响，与RI-NSV机理无直接关联，但叶尖间隙流动是RI-NSV的重要背景。

title: Linear Stability Analysis in Rotating Frames for Fan Blade Transition Prediction
abstract: A linear stability solver has been extended to rotating frames. The theoretical details of the linear stability theory in rotating frames are given. Validation is performed by comparing against the well-known Ekman layer case. Moreover, two new compressible validation cases are proposed for which very good agreement is well obtained. Linear stability analysis is then performed on a rotating fan blade with incoming flow, which is obtained by means of a Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes computation. By neglecting or taking into account rotation in the linear stability equations, the effect of rotation on transition mechanisms is investigated. Moreover, factors are computed for transition prediction. The present results show that rotation hardly modifies the growth rate of Tollmien–Schlichting instabilities. However, rotation destabilizes stationary crossflow waves, but not enough to trigger transition.
affiliations: Université de Toulouse
ONERA–University of Toulouse, F-31055 Toulouse, France
Université Paris-Saclay
ONERA–Paris Saclay University, F-92190 Meudon, France
summary_zh: 将线性稳定性分析扩展到旋转坐标系，用于风扇叶片转捩预测。通过Ekman层和两个可压缩验证案例验证理论。对RANS计算的旋转风扇叶片进行稳定性分析，发现旋转对Tollmien-Schlichting波增长率影响很小，但会失稳驻留横流波，不足以触发转捩。
method: 数值仿真：线性稳定性理论在旋转坐标系下的扩展，结合RANS计算获取叶片边界层，进行稳定性分析和转捩预测。
innovation: 首次将线性稳定性分析系统性地扩展到旋转坐标系，并针对风扇叶片转捩问题，量化了旋转对Tollmien-Schlichting波和横流波稳定性的影响。
conclusions: 旋转对Tollmien-Schlichting波增长率影响很小；旋转会失稳驻留横流波，但失稳程度不足以触发转捩。
limitations: 仅针对单个风扇叶片工况，未考虑叶尖间隙、非定常效应及复杂流动环境。
relevance_reason: 论文研究旋转对叶片边界层稳定性的影响，与RI-NSV机理无直接关联，但稳定性分析方法对理解流动失稳有参考价值。

title: A New Experimental Facility for Characterizing Bladed Disk Dynamics at Design Speed
abstract: An experimental facility for structural dynamics programs that uses an above-ground containment tank specifically designed to house bladed disks operating at design speed is described in this work. Key characteristics of the facility are discussed, and the configuration for a blade damping and mistuning study are presented. In particular, the development of an air-jet excitation system that can operate in different configurations to excite synchronous and nonsynchronous vibrations is detailed. Also, the measurement capabilities using a noncontact tip timing system as well as strain gauges are highlighted. Finally, results of data demonstrating the effectiveness of the facility for damping and mistuning studies are discussed.
affiliations: The Ohio State University
The Ohio State University, Columbus, Ohio 43210
summary_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于表征设计转速下叶盘动力学特性的新实验设施，包括地面安全壳、气射流激励系统（可同步/非同步振动）、非接触叶尖定时和应变片测量。展示了该设施在阻尼和失谐研究中的有效性。
method: 实验研究，采用气射流激励系统激发同步和非同步振动，使用叶尖定时和应变片测量，设计转速下运行。
innovation: 开发了可配置的气射流激励系统以激发非同步振动，结合叶尖定时和应变片，为阻尼和失谐研究提供新平台。
conclusions: 该设施能有效激发和测量非同步振动，适用于阻尼和失谐研究。
limitations: 未涉及具体非同步振动机理或控制方法，仅验证设施功能。
relevance_reason: 论文直接涉及非同步振动（NSV）的实验激发和测量，但未聚焦于旋转不稳定性（RI）导致的NSV机理或控制。

title: Vortex Model and Blade Span Influence on Orthogonal Blade-Vortex Interaction Noise
abstract: The influence of the vortex impingement location on the aerodynamic and acoustic response of a rotating blade during an orthogonal interaction is studied by means of computational fluid dynamics. The objective is to identify and quantify precisely the noise reduction achieved by reducing the blade span. The Batchelor vortex model is primarily considered as it accounts for the axial velocity deficit observed in the core of realistic tip vortices. Separated simulations were also carried out for a Lamb–Oseen vortex and a purely axial velocity deficit to highlight and quantify the influence of the vortex velocity components on the interaction as well as to balance design optimizations performed relying on methods not able to model viscous effects. The analysis of the blade aerodynamic and acoustic responses shows that the magnitude of the thrust fluctuation and radiated noise are always higher for a Batchelor vortex than for a Lamb–Oseen vortex when the vortex core impinges below the blade tip. For both vortex models, the thrust fluctuation and radiated noise reach their peak for an interaction close to the blade tip. They decrease slowly as the vortex impingement moves inward the blade and decrease strongly as the vortex passes above the tip. Finally, the noise directivity pattern is dipolar for the interaction close to or above the blade tip and becomes more and more quadrupolar as the radius of the interaction moves toward the blade root.
affiliations: Office National d'Études et de Recherches Aérospatiales
ONERA–The French Aerospace Lab, F-92322 Châtillon, France
ONERA–The French Aerospace Lab, F-92120 Meudon, France
ParisTech
Arts et Métiers
Laboratoire de Dynamique des Fluides
Arts et Métiers ParisTech, Dynfluid Laboratory, F-75013 Paris, France
DynFluid - Laboratoire de Dynamique des Fluides (F-75013 Paris - France)
summary_zh: 采用计算流体动力学研究正交叶尖涡-叶片相互作用中涡撞击位置对旋转叶片气动和声学响应的影响，重点分析Batchelor涡模型与叶片展长缩减的降噪效果。发现涡核撞击叶尖下方时推力波动和辐射噪声最大，且Batchelor涡比Lamb-Oseen涡产生更高响应；噪声指向性随撞击位置从叶尖向叶根由偶极子变为四极子。
method: 数值仿真（CFD），采用Batchelor、Lamb-Oseen涡模型及纯轴向速度亏损模型，研究不同涡撞击位置（叶尖、叶中、叶根）对叶片响应的影响。
innovation: 系统对比了Batchelor涡与Lamb-Oseen涡在正交叶片-涡相互作用中的差异，揭示了轴向速度亏损对气动和声学响应的重要影响，并量化了叶片展长缩减的降噪效果。
conclusions: 1. 涡核撞击叶尖下方时推力波动和辐射噪声达到峰值，且Batchelor涡响应高于Lamb-Oseen涡。2. 噪声指向性从叶尖附近的偶极子向叶根附近的四极子转变。
limitations: 仅考虑正交相互作用，未涉及斜向或平行相互作用；未考虑叶片弹性变形或非定常流动分离。
relevance_reason: 论文研究叶片-涡相互作用噪声，与风扇/压气机流致振动有参考价值，但未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Influence of Upstream Total Pressure Profiles on S-Duct Intake Flow Distortion
abstract: For some embedded engine arrangements, the nature of the inlet distortion is influenced by the boundary layer characteristics at the inlet plane of the intake. This research presents the first quantitative assessment on the influence of inlet boundary layer thickness and asymmetry on the swirl distortion at the exit of an S-shaped intake. Measurements of high spatial and temporal resolution have been acquired at the outlet plane of the S-duct using time-resolved particle image velocimetry. When boundary layer profiles typical of embedded engines are introduced, the characteristic secondary flows at the outlet plane are intensified. Overall, the peak swirl intensity increases by 40% for a boundary layer which is seven times thicker than the reference case. The unsteady modes of the S-duct remain, although the dominant fluctuations in the flow arise at a frequency 50% lower. When the inlet boundary layer profile becomes asymmetric about the intake centerline, the peak swirl events at the hub are reduced by up to 40%. At the tip, the peak swirl intensity increases by 29%. The results demonstrate that the effects of inlet boundary layer thickness and asymmetry must be carefully considered as part of engine compatibility tests for complex intakes.
affiliations: Cranfield University
Cranfield University, Cranfield, England MK43 0AL, United Kingdom
summary_zh: 该研究通过高时空分辨率粒子图像测速（PIV）实验，首次定量评估了S形进气道入口边界层厚度和不对称性对出口旋流畸变的影响。结果表明，边界层增厚7倍使峰值旋流强度增加40%，不对称分布使轮毂处峰值旋流降低40%、叶尖处增加29%。
method: 实验测量：采用时间分辨粒子图像测速（TR-PIV）获取S形进气道出口平面的高分辨率流场数据，对比不同入口边界层厚度和不对称性工况。
innovation: 首次定量评估入口边界层厚度和不对称性对S形进气道出口旋流畸变的影响，揭示了边界层特性对二次流强度和主导频率的调控作用。
conclusions: 1. 入口边界层厚度增加7倍使出口峰值旋流强度提高40%，主导波动频率降低50%。2. 入口边界层不对称性使轮毂峰值旋流降低40%，叶尖峰值旋流增加29%。
limitations: 仅针对S形进气道，未涉及风扇/压气机叶片响应；未考虑非定常气动弹性效应。
relevance_reason: 论文研究进气畸变对旋流的影响，与风扇/压气机流动稳定性相关，但未直接涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Influence of Temperature Distribution on Radial Growth of Compressor Disks
abstract: Abstract For the next generation of aero-engines, manufacturers are planning to increase the overall compressor pressure ratio from the existing values around 50:1 to values of 70:1. The requirement to control the tight clearances between the blade tips and the casing overall engine-operating conditions is a challenge for the engine designer attempting to minimize tip-clearances losses. Accurate prediction of the tip clearance requires an accurate prediction of the radial growth of the compressor rotor, which depends on the temperature distribution of the disk. The flow in the rotating cavities between adjacent disks is buoyancy-driven, which creates a conjugate heat transfer problem: the disk temperature depends on the radial distribution of the Nusselt number, which in turn depends on the radial distribution of disk temperature. This paper focuses on calculating the radial growth of a simplified compressor disk in isolation from the other components. Calculations were performed using steady one-dimensional (1D) theoretical and two-dimensional numerical computations (2D finite element analysis (FEA)) for overall pressure ratios (OPRs) of 50:1, 60:1, and 70:1. At each pressure ratio, calculations were conducted for five different temperature distributions; the distribution based on an experimentally validated buoyancy model was used as the datum case, and the results from this were compared with those from linear, quadratic, cubic, and quartic power laws. The results show that the assumed distribution of disk temperature has a significant effect on the calculated disk growth, whereas the pressure ratio has only a relatively small effect. Good agreement between the growth calculated by the 1D theoretical model and the FEA suggests that the 1D model should be useful for design purposes. Although the results were obtained for steady-state conditions, a method is outlined for calculating the growth under transient conditions.
affiliations: University of Bath
Department of Mechanical Engineering, University of Bath, Bath BA2 7AY, UK
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 针对下一代高增压比压气机，研究了盘温分布对转子径向增长的影响。采用一维理论模型和二维有限元分析，在50:1至70:1总压比下比较了五种温度分布，发现温度分布假设对盘增长影响显著，而压比影响较小。一维模型与有限元结果吻合良好，可用于设计。
method: 数值仿真：一维理论模型和二维有限元分析，总压比50:1、60:1、70:1，五种温度分布（基准线性、二次、三次、四次幂律）。
innovation: 系统量化了不同温度分布假设对压气机盘径向增长的影响，并验证了一维模型在稳态下的准确性，为瞬态计算提供方法。
conclusions: 盘温分布对径向增长影响显著，而压比影响较小；一维模型与二维FEA结果吻合良好，可用于设计。
limitations: 仅针对简化孤立盘，未考虑叶片、机匣等耦合效应；仅稳态分析。
relevance_reason: 论文研究叶尖间隙预测中的盘径向增长，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但对叶尖间隙控制有参考价值。

title: Effect of Gurney Flap on Performance and Aeroacoustics of Variable-Pitch Axial Fans
abstract: For a variable-pitch axial fan with guide vanes, the effect of three series of Gurney flaps (GFs) configured at the trailing edge of blades on the performance and dynamics is numerically investigated; and the aerodynamic noise is predicted. Simulated results show that GFs increase the total pressure rise of the fan; the higher the GF height, the more notable the lifting capacity. The working point of the highest efficiency moves toward the large flow rate. GF0.5-100 extends the high-efficiency scope and increases efficiency by an average of 2.09%; and GF2-50R raises efficiency by an average of 1.12%. After implementing a GF, the dynamics in the impeller distinctly. Compared with the original fan, a secondary tip leakage vortex generated at the blade tip aggravates the leakage loss; a pair of shedding vortices generated in the downstream of the trailing edge promotes the pressure difference between the suction and pressure surfaces. The prediction with the large-eddy simulation method indicates that GFs heighten the aerodynamic noise of the fan, and GF0.5-100 and GF2-50R increase the sound pressure level by 12 and 13 dB, respectively. Although the GF0.5-100 and GF2-50R are preferred choices for such axial fans, some necessary measures should be taken to reduce the acoustic noise in practical applications.
affiliations: North China Electric Power University
North China Electric Power University, 071003 Baoding, People’s Republic of China
North China Electric Power University, 071003 Baoding, People's Republic of China
summary_zh: 针对变桨距轴流风扇，数值研究了三种Gurney襟翼（GF）对性能、动力学和噪声的影响。GF提高了总压升和效率，但产生了二次叶尖泄漏涡和尾缘脱落涡，加剧了泄漏损失，同时使气动噪声增加12-13 dB。
method: 数值仿真，采用大涡模拟（LES）预测噪声，研究不同高度和布置的GF（如GF0.5-100、GF2-50R）对风扇性能的影响。
innovation: 系统评估了Gurney襟翼在变桨距轴流风扇中的气动和声学效果，揭示了GF对叶尖泄漏涡和尾缘涡结构的影响。
conclusions: GF0.5-100使效率平均提高2.09%，GF2-50R提高1.12%，但两者分别使声压级增加12 dB和13 dB。
limitations: 仅针对特定风扇和GF配置，未考虑非定常流动与叶片振动的耦合。
relevance_reason: 论文研究Gurney襟翼对风扇性能和噪声的影响，未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动，但与叶尖泄漏流和流动控制相关，对风扇/压气机流致振动有参考价值。

title: Numerical Simulation of Rotor-Stator Interaction Noise in Transonic Cascades
abstract: The first objective of this work is the verification of a moving-body immersed boundary method for the direct computation of noise generated by rotor-stator interactions in transonic 2-D cascades. This method is based on a discrete forcing approach where the boundary conditions are directly imposed at the surface of moving and static cascades immersed in a domain discretized by a regular Cartesian grid. The numerical method is verified using the mode generation and propagation theory applied to thin annular ducts for two-dimensional cascades. Two cases are simulated, the rotor alone and the rotor-stator interaction. For the first case, all computed modes are generated following the Tyler-Sofrin rule, but none of them are cut-on, as predicted by the duct propagation theory. For the second case, all modes are also generated in accordance with that rule, and the numerical results for the cut-on modes are also in excellent agreement with the duct propagation theory regarding mode number, signal, and angle of the wavefront. The second objective is to study the effect of decreasing rotor-stator separation on tone and broadband noise.
affiliations: Universidade de Brasília
University of Brasilia, 70910-900 Brasilia, Brazil
summary_zh: 该工作验证了一种移动体浸入边界法用于直接计算跨音二维叶栅中转子-静子相互作用噪声。方法基于离散力方法，在规则笛卡尔网格上直接施加边界条件。通过薄环形管道中的模态生成与传播理论验证了数值方法。模拟了单独转子和转子-静子相互作用两种情况，所有模态均符合Tyler-Sofrin规则，且传播模态的数值结果与理论吻合良好。还研究了减小转子-静子间距对单音和宽带噪声的影响。
method: 数值仿真，采用移动体浸入边界法（离散力方法）在二维跨音叶栅中直接计算转子-静子相互作用噪声。
innovation: 将浸入边界法应用于跨音叶栅转子-静子噪声直接计算，并通过模态理论验证了方法的准确性。
conclusions: 1. 所有生成模态均符合Tyler-Sofrin规则，且传播模态的数值结果与理论在模态数、信号和波前角度上高度一致。2. 减小转子-静子间距会影响单音和宽带噪声。
limitations: 仅针对二维跨音叶栅，未考虑三维效应和真实几何。
relevance_reason: 论文研究转子-静子相互作用噪声，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但涉及叶轮机械非定常流动与噪声，对理解流动不稳定性有参考价值。

title: An experimental method for squealer tip flow field considering relative casing motion
abstract: Squealer tip is widely used in turbines to reduce tip leakage loss. In typical turbine environment, the squealer tip leakage flow is affected by multiple factors such as the relative casing motion and the wide range of variable incidence angles. The development of experimental methods which can accurately model the real turbine environment and influencing factors is of great significance to study the squealer tip leakage flow mechanism. In the present paper, a low-speed turbine cascade test facility which can model the relative casing motion and wide range of variable incidence angles (−25° to 55°) is built. Based on the similarity criteria, a high-low speed similarity transformation method of the turbine cascade is established by considering the thickness of the turbine blade. A combined testing method of Particle Image Velocimetry (PIV) and local pressure measurement is proposed to obtain the complex flow structures within the tip cavity. The results show that the experimental method can successfully model the relative casing motion and the wide range of variable incidence angles. The low-speed cascade obtained by the similarity transformation can model the high-speed flow accurately. The measurement technique developed can obtain the complex flow field and successfully capture the scraping vortex within the squealer tip.
affiliations: Beihang University
Collaborative Innovation Center for Advanced Aero-Engine, School of Energy & Power Engineering, Beihang University, Beijing 100083, China
National Key Laboratory of Science and Technology on Aero-Engine Aero-thermodynamics, School of Energy & Power Engineering, Beihang University, Beijing 100083, China
summary_zh: 本文针对涡轮叶尖泄漏流受相对机匣运动和宽范围攻角影响的问题，建立了可模拟相对机匣运动和攻角范围-25°至55°的低速涡轮叶栅实验台。基于相似准则建立了高低速相似变换方法，结合PIV和局部压力测量获取叶尖腔内复杂流动结构，成功捕捉了刮削涡。
method: 实验方法：低速涡轮叶栅实验台，模拟相对机匣运动和宽范围攻角；PIV与局部压力测量结合；基于相似准则的高低速变换。
innovation: 建立了可模拟相对机匣运动和宽范围攻角的实验方法，并提出了高低速相似变换方法，实现了对高速流动的准确模拟。
conclusions: 1. 实验方法成功模拟了相对机匣运动和宽范围攻角；2. 相似变换后的低速叶栅能准确模拟高速流动，PIV与压力测量结合可捕捉刮削涡。
limitations: 仅针对涡轮叶尖泄漏流，未涉及压气机或旋转不稳定性；低速实验台与真实高速环境存在差异。
relevance_reason: 论文研究涡轮叶尖泄漏流实验方法，与风扇/压气机RI-NSV无直接关联，但叶尖间隙流动对RI有参考价值。

title: Effect of bent inlet pipe on the flow instability behavior of centrifugal compressors
abstract: Bent inlet pipes are often used in centrifugal compressors due to limited installation space, and an understanding of the effect on compressor stability is essential for safety and durability. This paper firstly investigates flow instability behaviors in two compressors, one with a straight inlet pipe and the other with an S-shaped bent pipe. In detail, it analyzes the resulting flow fields, instability evolution paths and surge boundaries. The results show that the S-shaped pipe obviously affects the flow field at high mass flow rates, while reverse flow mainly influences the flow field at low mass flow rates. Reverse flow first occurs at certain flow passages with a high pressure difference that is predominantly decided by the volute rather than the S-shaped bent pipe. In addition, centrifugal compressors can tolerate reverse flow to some extent so that surge would not occur immediately if reverse flow occurs unless the reverse flow region extends circumferentially and radially to a sufficiently large size. Since the S-shaped pipe is not dominant in the creation and extension of reverse flow, it does not exacerbate the stability of the central compressor to a great extent. Last but not least, the S-shaped pipe is noted to delay the occurrence of surge at 90% rotating speed, which suggests the possibility of improving compressor stability with bent inlet pipes. This result differs from the conventional understanding that inlet distortion usually deteriorates compressor stability and emphasizes the particularity of centrifugal compressors.
affiliations: Tsinghua University
Department of Aerodynamics and Thermodynamics, Institute for Aero Engine, Tsinghua University, Beijing 100084, China
IHI Corporation (Japan)
Corporate Research & Development, IHI Corporation, Yokohama 235-8501, Japan
State Key Laboratory of Automotive Safety and Energy, School of Vehicle and Mobility, Tsinghua University, Beijing 100084, China
summary_zh: 研究了S形弯管对离心压气机流动不稳定性的影响。通过对比直管和弯管两种进气构型，分析了流场、失稳演化路径和喘振边界。发现弯管在高流量时影响流场，但回流主要由蜗壳决定；弯管在90%转速下延迟了喘振发生，表明弯管可能改善稳定性。
method: 实验测量与数值仿真结合，对比直管和S形弯管进气构型，分析不同转速和流量下的流场及失稳特征。
innovation: 发现S形弯管在特定转速下延迟喘振，挑战了进气畸变恶化稳定性的传统认知，揭示了离心压气机的特殊性。
conclusions: 1. 回流首先出现在蜗壳决定的高压差流道，而非弯管；2. 弯管在90%转速下延迟喘振发生，表明其可能改善稳定性。
limitations: 仅针对特定S形弯管和转速，未涉及其他弯管形状或全转速范围。
relevance_reason: 论文研究进气畸变对离心压气机稳定性的影响，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但涉及流动失稳机理，对理解非定常流动有参考价值。

title: Prestall Instability in Axial Flow Compressors
abstract: Abstract The aim of the present paper is to improve the physical understanding of discrete prestall flow disturbances developing in the tip area of the compressor rotor. For this purpose, a complementary instrumentation was used in a single-stage axial compressor. A set of pressure transducers evenly distributed along the circumference surface mounted in the casing near the rotor tip leading edges measures the time-resolved wall pressures simultaneously to an array of transducers recording the chordwise static pressures. The latter allows for plotting quasi-instantaneous casing pressure contours. Any occurring flow disturbances can be properly classified using validated frequency analysis methods applied to the data from the circumferential sensors. While leaving the flow coefficient constant, a continuously changing number of prestall flow disturbances appears to be causing a unique spectral signature, which is known from investigations on rotating instability. Any arising number of disturbances is matching a specific mode order found within this signature. While the flow coefficient is reduced, the propagation speed of prestall disturbances increases linearly, and meanwhile, the speed seems to be independent from the clearance size. Casing contour plots phase-locked to the rotor additionally provide a strong hint on prestall disturbances clearly not to be caused by a leading edge separation. Data taken beyond the stalling limit demonstrate a complex superposition of stall cells and flow disturbances, which the title “prestall disturbance” therefore does not fit to precisely any more. Different convection speeds allow the phenomena to be clearly distinguished from each other. Furthermore, statistical analysis of the pressure fluctuations caused by the prestall disturbances offer the potential to use them as a stall precursor or to quantify the deterioration of the clearance height between the rotor blade tips and the casing wall during the lifetime of an engine.
affiliations: Technische Universität Berlin
Institute of Aeronautics and Astronautics, Technische Universität Berlin, Marchstraße 12-14, 10587 Berlin, Germany
summary_zh: 本文通过实验研究轴流压气机转子叶尖区域的失速前流动扰动，使用周向压力传感器和弦向静压阵列测量壁面压力，发现失速前扰动数量变化产生类似旋转不稳定性的频谱特征，扰动传播速度随流量系数减小线性增加且与间隙尺寸无关，并可作为失速前兆或间隙退化指标。
method: 实验研究，单级轴流压气机，周向压力传感器和弦向静压阵列，频率分析和统计方法，变流量系数和间隙尺寸。
innovation: 揭示了失速前扰动数量与旋转不稳定性模态阶数的对应关系，并发现扰动传播速度与间隙尺寸无关，提出利用扰动作为失速前兆或间隙退化指标。
conclusions: 失速前扰动传播速度随流量系数减小线性增加，且与间隙尺寸无关；扰动可作为失速前兆或量化叶尖间隙退化。
limitations: 仅针对单级低速压气机，未涉及高速或多级环境，且未直接研究非同步振动。
relevance_reason: 论文研究旋转不稳定性（RI）的频谱特征和传播速度，但未直接涉及非同步振动（NSV）或控制方法。

title: Optimization of Slots-Groove Coupled Casing Treatment for an Axial Transonic Compressor
abstract: Abstract A multi-objective optimization of a coupled casing treatment (CCT) for an axial transonic compressor is performed in this study. The coupled casing treatment is the basis axial slots with a circumferential groove located at various positions along the slots. During the optimization stage, five important parameters to control the geometry are used as the optimal variables. The stall margin and the peak efficiency are selected as the optimal objectives. Non-dominated sorting genetic algorithm II coupled with radial basis function (RBF) approximation is used to search for Pareto-optimal solutions. Then, four optimal configurations are selected from Pareto-front for further analysis. As shown in the simulation results with and without the coupled casing treatments, the leakage flow is reenergized and the blocking region near the blade leading edge at rotor tip is decreased by the use of these structures under the low flowrate condition, which is the main reason for stability enhancement. Besides, a coupled casing treatment with the groove settled near the end of the basis slots have the potential to generate more injection flow and extend the operating range of compressor further.
affiliations: Shanghai Jiao Tong University
School of Mechanical Engineering, Shanghai Jiaotong University, Shanghai 200240, China
School of Mechanical Engineering, Shanghai Jiaotong University, Shanghai 200000, China
summary_zh: 针对轴流跨声速压气机，采用非支配排序遗传算法II结合径向基函数近似，对槽-缝耦合机匣处理进行多目标优化，以失速裕度和峰值效率为目标。结果表明，耦合结构在低流量下重新激励泄漏流、减小叶尖前缘阻塞区，从而增强稳定性；将周向槽置于轴向缝末端附近可产生更多射流，进一步扩展稳定工作范围。
method: 数值仿真（RANS），采用NSGA-II与RBF近似进行多目标优化，工况为轴流跨声速压气机近失速点。
innovation: 首次对轴向缝与周向槽耦合的机匣处理进行多目标优化，揭示了槽位置对射流生成和稳定裕度的影响规律。
conclusions: 耦合机匣处理通过重新激励泄漏流和减小叶尖前缘阻塞区来提升失速裕度；将周向槽置于轴向缝末端附近可产生更多射流，进一步扩展稳定工作范围。
limitations: 仅基于数值仿真，缺乏实验验证；优化目标未包含非定常气动弹性或NSV抑制效果。
relevance_reason: 论文研究机匣处理对压气机稳定性的影响，与RI-NSV的流动控制手段相关，但未直接涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Shock Wave Generation and Radiation from a Turbofan Engine Under Flow Distortion
abstract: This paper presents aeroacoustic investigations on a full-scale ultrahigh-bypass-ratio engine with inflow distortion at transonic conditions. Computational fluid dynamics (CFD) simulations are first realized to compute the shocks in the vicinity of the fan. These shocks are then radiated in the near field thanks to computational aeroacoustics (CAA) simulations. The chaining between CFD and CAA simulations is done by injecting the shocks in terms of usual conservative variables using a nonreflecting boundary condition. The CAA solver is based on the nonlinearized Euler equations, which allows definition of the CFD/CAA interface close to the fan where the propagation of shocks is highly nonlinear. Both shock generation and propagation mechanisms are investigated, and the effects of inflow distortion are highlighted by comparison with a baseline case without distortion. The flow distortion is shown to be responsible for a modification of shock amplitudes along the circumferential direction. Thus, azimuthal modes appear in addition to the rotor-locked mode present without distortion. A particular feature of the studied configuration is the presence of a supersonic flow region in the bottom part of the nacelle. This supersonic pocket blocks the shocks in the lower half of the nacelle and modifies the angle at which they leave the nacelle in its upper half. Consequently, the far-field radiation (obtained using Kirchhoff’s integral method) is mainly oriented skyward and toward the side of descending blades. Acoustic power estimates are provided to quantify these effects.
affiliations: Université Paris-Saclay
Office National d'Études et de Recherches Aérospatiales
ONERA–Paris Saclay University, F-92322 Châtillon, France
summary_zh: 本文对一台全尺寸超高涵道比涡扇发动机在进气畸变下的激波产生与辐射进行了气动声学研究。通过CFD计算风扇附近激波，再以CAA模拟近场传播，发现畸变导致激波周向幅值变化并产生额外方位角模态，且短舱内超音速区改变了激波辐射方向。
method: 数值仿真：CFD计算激波，CAA基于非线性欧拉方程传播激波，结合非反射边界条件，对比有无畸变工况。
innovation: 首次在全尺寸超高涵道比发动机中结合CFD/CAA研究进气畸变对激波产生与辐射的影响，揭示了畸变引起的周向模态和超音速区对辐射方向的改变。
conclusions: 进气畸变使激波周向幅值变化，产生除转子锁定模态外的方位角模态；短舱底部超音速区阻挡激波并改变其出射角，导致远场辐射主要朝向天空和下行叶片侧。
limitations: 仅基于数值仿真，缺乏实验验证；未涉及非同步振动或旋转不稳定性。
relevance_reason: 论文研究进气畸变下激波产生与辐射，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但对畸变进气下风扇气动弹性有参考价值。

title: Validation Studies of Linear Oscillating Compressor Cascade and Use of Influence Coefficient Method
abstract: Abstract Advanced predictions of blade flutter have been continually pursued. It is noted however that validation cases of unsteady CFD methods against experimental cases with detailed 3D unsteady pressures are still rather lacking. The main objectives of the present work are two-folds. First, validate and understand the characteristics of blade tip clearance, as well as a bubble-type flow separation for an unsteady CFD solver against a 3D oscillating cascade experiment. And second, examine the applicability of the influence coefficient method (ICM) as widely used in an oscillating linear cascade setup. In the first part, the capability of a widely used commercial solver (CFX) for unsteady flows induced by a 3D oscillating compressor cascade is examined. The present computations have shown consistently a destabilizing effect of increasing blade tip clearance, in agreement with the experiment. More remarkably, the computational analyses reveal a distinctive interplay between the inlet endwall boundary layer and the tip clearance in relation to the aerodynamic damping. Different inlet endwall boundary layer thicknesses are shown to lead to qualitatively different aeroelastic stability characteristics in relation to tip clearance. The aero-damping variation with the tip clearance under the influence of the inlet endwall boundary layer seems to correlate closely to a balancing act between the passage vortex and the tip leakage vortex. The tip clearance aeroelastic behavior seems also in line with a simple quasi-steady analysis. On the other hand, the mid-chord laminar bubble separation on suction surface, though with a clear signature in the local aero-damping, has negligible effects on the overall stability. The second part aims to examine computationally the applicability of the influence coefficient method in a linear cascade setup. The comparison between the cascade-based ICM data and a baseline “tuned cascade” shows that the differences in the sensitivity to the far-field treatment can be significant, depending on inter-blade phase angles. On the other hand, non-linearity effects closely relevant to the basic linear assumption of the ICM are shown to only have a small influence. The present results suggest that extra caution should be exercised when comparing a CFD-based tuned cascade model with a finite cascade-based ICM model, at conditions close to acoustic resonance. The resultant discrepancies may well arise from the inherently different far-field sensitivities between the two models, rather than those typical numerical and physical modeling aspects of interest (e.g., meshing, spatial and temporal discretization errors as well as turbulence modeling).
affiliations: University of Oxford
Department of Engineering Science, University of Oxford, Oxford OX2 0ES, UK
summary_zh: 本研究通过数值模拟验证了线性振荡压气机叶栅实验，重点分析了叶尖间隙和进气端壁边界层对气动阻尼的影响，并评估了影响系数法（ICM）的适用性。结果表明，增大叶尖间隙具有失稳效应，且进气边界层厚度与叶尖间隙的相互作用显著影响气动弹性稳定性，而吸力面层流气泡分离对整体稳定性影响较小。ICM与调谐叶栅模型在声学共振条件下差异显著，源于远场敏感性不同。
method: 采用商用CFD求解器CFX进行三维非定常数值模拟，对比线性振荡叶栅实验，研究叶尖间隙、边界层厚度及气泡分离的影响，并评估影响系数法。
innovation: 揭示了进气端壁边界层与叶尖间隙对气动阻尼的耦合机制，发现通道涡与叶尖泄漏涡的平衡作用；系统评估了ICM在有限叶栅中的适用性及远场敏感性差异。
conclusions: 增大叶尖间隙一致地降低气动阻尼（失稳效应）；进气边界层厚度可定性改变叶尖间隙对稳定性的影响；ICM与调谐叶栅模型在声学共振附近差异显著，需谨慎对比。
limitations: 仅针对线性振荡叶栅，未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动；未考虑真实转子中的三维效应。
tags: 叶片流致振动预测模型
relevance_reason: 研究叶尖间隙对气动阻尼的影响，与叶尖泄漏流相关，但未直接涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Rotating Stall Control in an Axial Fan with Pulsed-Direct-Current Plasma Actuation
abstract: The use of dielectric barrier discharge plasma actuators to suppress traveling stall cells and thereby improve stall margin is examined. This involved the design and construction of a nonconductive high-solidity fan facility. The experiments were meant to support the application of similar systems in transonic axial compressors. Eight 63.5-mm-long plasma actuator segments were installed in the casing over the blade row at three axial locations that were indicated in the literature to be optimum for stall margin improvement. Independent control of fan revolutions per minute (RPM) and mass flow was used to set conditions that produced traveling stall cells. These were documented using an azimuthal array of microphones. The microphone pressure time series were spatially correlated to reveal the coherent wave packets. Different azimuthal combinations of the plasma actuators were investigated from a single actuator to all eight. A single actuator reduced the local spatial correlation metric (SCM), a measure of stall cell activity, by 40% and the azimuthally averaged SCM by 30%. A “memory effect” on the stall cell suppression was revealed, and it persisted for approximately 180° of the casing azimuth. The effect of the plasma actuator axial location was investigated at the design RPM and at two off-design RPMs. At the design RPM, the two most optimum locations were slightly upstream of the blade row and at the midchord of the blade row. This changed for the off-design conditions. For the range of the fan RPMs and actuator locations investigated, the stall margin improvements ranged from 1.63 to 5.45%. Finally, a plasma actuator stall extension model is presented for relating the required plasma actuator body force to the achieved stall margin improvement.
affiliations: University of Notre Dame
University of Notre Dame, Notre Dame, Indiana 46556
Creare (United States)
Creare LLC, Hanover, New Hampshire 03755
summary_zh: 采用介质阻挡放电等离子体激励器抑制轴流风扇旋转失速，实验研究不同周向组合和轴向位置对失速裕度的影响，发现单激励器可降低空间相关指标40%，失速裕度提升1.63%-5.45%，并建立激励器力与裕度改进的模型。
method: 实验方法，在非导电高稠度风扇机匣上安装8个等离子体激励器，通过麦克风阵列测量压力，分析空间相关性和失速裕度。
innovation: 首次在轴流风扇中系统研究脉冲直流等离子体激励器的周向组合和轴向位置对旋转失速抑制的影响，并揭示记忆效应。
conclusions: 单激励器降低局部空间相关指标40%，平均降低30%；失速裕度提升1.63%-5.45%，最佳轴向位置在叶片前缘和中部。
limitations: 仅针对低速轴流风扇，未验证跨声速压气机；未涉及非同步振动或旋转不稳定性。
relevance_reason: 论文研究旋转失速控制，未涉及非同步振动或旋转不稳定性，但对压气机流动控制有参考价值。

title: Utilization of Fast Response Pressure Measurements to Non-Intrusively Monitor Blade Vibration in Axial Compressors
abstract: Abstract A novel non-intrusive method has been developed to monitor rotor blade vibration using unsteady casing pressure. The present blade vibration monitoring technique utilizes casing unsteady pressure sensors that can detect the pressure waves associated with blade vibration. Spinning mode theory was used to identify the specific frequencies and nodal diameters (NDs) of the spinning pressure waves associated with the blade vibration. A dual temporal-spatial analysis method has been developed to extract the specific frequency components using Fourier transforms, and the specific ND component was extracted using a circumferential mode-fitting algorithm. An experimental study was done in the Purdue 3-stage axial research compressor to verify the new rotor blade vibration monitoring method against the blade tip timing (BTT) method. During the experiment, the compressor was swept through the resonant crossing speed corresponding to the first torsion (1T) vibratory mode of the embedded rotor, while the unsteady casing pressure data and BTT data were simultaneously acquired. Utilizing as few as two sensors, the pressure wave due to blade forced vibration was extracted. A constant scaling factor between the resultant pressure wave strength and blade deflection amplitude was calculated for two different loading conditions. The close match between blade vibration-generated pressure wave strength and blade deflection amplitude through the resonant range provides the validation for the new rotor blade vibration monitoring method. This is the first time in the open literature that blade vibration-related pressure waves have been extracted from casing pressure sensor arrays and used to quantify blade vibration.
affiliations: Purdue University West Lafayette
Purdue University School of Mechanical Engineering, , 500 Allison Road , West Lafayette, IN 47907
summary_zh: 开发了一种利用机匣非定常压力非侵入监测转子叶片振动的新方法。通过旋转模态理论识别与叶片振动相关的压力波频率和节径，采用双时空分析法提取特征。在三级轴流压气机上实验验证，与叶尖定时法对比，发现压力波强度与叶片振幅在共振范围内高度匹配。
method: 实验研究，在Purdue三级轴流研究压气机上进行，通过扫频跨越转子1T模态共振转速，同时采集机匣非定常压力和叶尖定时数据。
innovation: 首次从机匣压力传感器阵列中提取叶片振动相关压力波并用于量化叶片振动，仅需两个传感器即可实现非侵入监测。
conclusions: 叶片振动产生的压力波强度与叶片挠度振幅在共振范围内高度匹配，验证了新方法的有效性。
limitations: 仅验证了强迫振动下的1T模态，未涉及非同步振动或旋转不稳定性。
tags: 叶片流致振动预测模型
relevance_reason: 论文关注叶片振动监测方法，未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动机理、预测或控制。

title: Scaling of Incidence Variations With Inlet Distortion for a Transonic Axial Compressor
abstract: Abstract This paper numerically explores the manner in which blade row inlet incidence variation scales with various distortion patterns and intensities. The objectives are to (1) identify the most appropriate parameter whose circumferential variation can be used to assess scaling relationships of a transonic compressor and (2) use this parameter to evaluate two types of non-uniform inflow patterns, vertically stratified total pressure distortions and radially stratified total enthalpy and total pressure distortions. A body force model of the blade rows is employed to reduce computational cost; the approach has been shown to capture distortion transfer and to be able to predict upstream flow redistribution with inlet distortion. Diffusion factor is shown to be an inadequate proxy for streamline loss generation in non-uniform flow, leading to the choice of incidence angle variations as the metric for which we assess scaling relationships. Posteriori scaling of circumferential flow angle variation based on the maximum incidence excursion for varying distortion intensity yields an accurate method for prediction of the impact for other distortion intensities; linear regression of the maximum variation in incidence around the annulus as a function of distortion intensity had R2 &gt; 0.97 for all spanwise locations examined in both the rotor and stator for both vertically and radially stratified distortions. However, changes to far upstream distortion shape yield highly non-linear incidence variation scaling; the results suggest that the pitchwise gradients of far upstream total pressure govern the degree of linearity for incidence variation scaling.
affiliations: University of Windsor
Turbomachinery and Unsteady Flows Research Group, Department of Mechanical, Automotive, and Materials Engineering, University of Windsor, Windsor, ON, N9B 3P4, Canada
summary_zh: 本文采用体力模型数值研究跨声速压气机叶片排进口攻角变化随畸变图谱和强度的缩放规律。发现扩散因子不适合作为非均匀流中损失生成的代理，而攻角变化是更合适的度量。基于最大攻角偏移的缩放可准确预测不同畸变强度的影响，线性回归R²>0.97。但上游畸变形状变化导致非线性缩放，其周向梯度决定线性度。
method: 数值仿真，采用体力模型模拟叶片排，研究垂直分层总压畸变和径向分层总焓/总压畸变，工况为跨声速轴流压气机。
innovation: 系统评估了不同畸变图谱和强度下攻角变化的缩放关系，发现扩散因子不适用，并揭示了上游畸变形状周向梯度对缩放线性度的控制作用。
conclusions: 1. 攻角变化是评估畸变缩放关系的合适参数，基于最大攻角偏移的缩放可准确预测不同畸变强度的影响（R²>0.97）。2. 上游畸变形状变化导致攻角缩放高度非线性，其周向梯度决定线性度。
limitations: 仅采用体力模型，未考虑真实叶片几何和三维流动细节；仅研究两种畸变类型，未涵盖其他畸变形式。
relevance_reason: 论文研究畸变进气下攻角变化缩放，与RI-NSV机理无直接关联，但畸变进气可能诱发非定常流动，对理解RI-NSV的进气条件有参考价值。

title: The Role of Reynolds Number Effect and Tip Leakage in Compressor Geometry Scaling at Low Turbulent Reynolds Numbers
abstract: Abstract In compressor design, a convenient way to save time is to scale an existing geometry to required specifications, rather than developing a new design. The approach works well when scaling compressors of similar size at high Reynolds numbers but becomes more complex when applied to small-scale machines. Besides the well-understood increase in surface friction due to increased relative surface roughness, two other main problems specific to small-scale turbomachinery can be specified: (1) the Reynolds number effect, describing the non-linear dependency of surface friction on Reynolds number and (2) increased relative tip clearance resulting from manufacturing limitations. This paper investigates the role of both effects in a geometric scaling process, as used by a designer. The work is based on numerical models derived from an experimentally validated geometry. First, the effects of geometric scaling on compressor performance are assessed analytically. Second, prediction capabilities of reduced-order models from the public domain are assessed. In addition to design point assessment, often found in other publications, the models are tested at off-design. Third, the impact of tip leakage on compressor performance and its Reynolds number dependency is assessed. Here, geometries of different scale and with different tip clearances are investigated numerically. Fourth, a detailed investigation regarding tip leakage driving mechanisms is carried out and design recommendations to improve small-scale compressor performance are provided.
affiliations: École Polytechnique Fédérale de Lausanne
Laboratory for Applied Mechanical Design, École Polytechnique Fédérale de Lausanne, Neuchâtel 2000, Switzerland
Laboratory for Applied Mechanical Design, École Polytechnique Fédérale de Lausanne, Neuchâtel 2002, Switzerland
summary_zh: 本文研究了低湍流雷诺数下压气机几何缩放中雷诺数效应和叶尖泄漏的影响。通过数值模拟分析了缩放对性能的影响，评估了降阶模型的预测能力，并探讨了叶尖泄漏的驱动机制，为小尺度压气机设计提供了建议。
method: 数值仿真，基于实验验证的几何模型，分析设计点和非设计点性能，评估降阶模型。
innovation: 系统研究了低雷诺数下几何缩放中雷诺数效应和叶尖泄漏的耦合影响，并提供了设计建议。
conclusions: 1. 雷诺数效应和叶尖泄漏显著影响小尺度压气机性能。2. 降阶模型在非设计点预测能力有限。
limitations: 仅基于数值模型，缺乏实验验证；未涉及非同步振动等动态问题。
relevance_reason: 论文研究叶尖泄漏和雷诺数效应，与RI-NSV的叶尖泄漏流机理相关，但未直接涉及非同步振动。

title: Analytical Formulation of Friction Contact Elements for Frequency-Domain Analysis of Nonlinear Vibrations of Structures With High-Energy Rubs
abstract: Abstract In gas-turbine engines and other rotating machinery structures, rubbing contact interactions can occur when the contacting components have large relative motion between components: such as in rotating bladed disk-casing rubbing contacts, and rubbing in rotor bearing and labyrinth seals. The analysis of vibrations of structures with rubbing contacts requires the development of a mathematical model and special friction contact elements that would allow for the prescribed relative motion of rubbing surfaces in addition to the motion due to vibrations of the contacting components. In the proposed paper, the formulation of the friction contact elements is developed, which includes the effects of the prescribed relative motion on the friction stick-slip transitions and, therefore, on the contact interaction forces. For a first time, the formulation is made for the frequency domain analysis of coupled rubbing and vibrational motion, using the multiharmonic representation of the vibration displacements. The formulation is made fully analytically to express the multiharmonic contact interaction forces and multiharmonic tangent stiffness matrix in an explicit analytical form allowing their calculation accurately and fast. The dependency of the friction and contact stiffness coefficients on the energy dissipated during high-energy rubbing contacts and, hence, on the corresponding increase of the contact interface temperature is included in the formulation. The efficiency of the developed friction elements is demonstrated on a set of test cases including simple models and a large-scale realistic blade.
affiliations: University of Sussex
School of Engineering and Informatics, University of Sussex,Brighton BN1 9QT, UK
venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文针对燃气轮机等旋转机械中叶片-机匣等接触部件的高能摩擦接触问题，提出了一种频域摩擦接触单元解析公式。该公式首次将预设相对运动对摩擦粘滑转换的影响纳入频域分析，采用多谐波表示振动位移，并显式表达接触力与切线刚度矩阵，同时考虑摩擦和接触刚度系数对耗散能量及界面温升的依赖。通过简单模型和大型叶片实例验证了其效率。
method: 理论推导与数值验证：基于多谐波频域方法，解析推导摩擦接触单元公式，并通过简单模型和大型叶片算例验证。
innovation: 首次在频域分析中解析地纳入预设相对运动对摩擦粘滑转换的影响，并显式表达多谐波接触力与切线刚度矩阵，同时考虑能量耗散导致的温升效应。
conclusions: 1. 提出的摩擦接触单元能准确高效地分析高能摩擦接触下的非线性振动。2. 该公式可处理耦合的摩擦与振动运动，适用于大型实际叶片结构。
limitations: 主要针对高能摩擦接触，未涉及低能或微滑移情况；未考虑接触面磨损等长期效应。
tags: 叶片流致振动预测模型
relevance_reason: 论文研究摩擦接触对叶片振动的影响，属于泛化叶片振动与流固耦合，与RI-NSV机理、预测或控制无直接关联。

title: Surge and Stall Detection Using Acoustic Analysis for Gas Turbine Hybrid Cycles
abstract: Abstract Compressor dynamics were studied in a gas turbine—fuel cell hybrid power system having a larger compressor volume than traditionally found in gas turbine systems. This larger compressor volume adversely affects the surge margin of the gas turbine. Industrial acoustic sensors were placed near the compressor to identify when the equipment was getting close to the surge line. Fast Fourier transform (FFT) mathematical analysis was used to obtain spectra representing the probability density across the frequency range (0–5000 Hz). Comparison between FFT spectra for nominal and transient operations revealed that higher amplitude spikes were observed during incipient stall at three different frequencies, 900, 1020, and 1800 Hz. These frequencies were compared to the natural frequencies of the equipment and the frequency for the rotating turbomachinery to identify more general nature of the acoustic signal typical of the onset of compressor surge. The primary goal of this acoustic analysis was to establish an online methodology to monitor compressor stability that can be anticipated and avoided.

summary_zh: 该研究针对燃气轮机-燃料电池混合动力系统中压缩机容积增大导致的喘振裕度下降问题，通过工业声学传感器采集压缩机近喘振线时的声学信号，利用FFT分析频谱，发现喘振初期在900、1020和1800 Hz频率处出现高幅值尖峰，并与设备固有频率和旋转机械频率对比，旨在建立在线监测压缩机稳定性的声学方法。
method: 实验测量为主，采用工业声学传感器和FFT频谱分析，工况涵盖额定和瞬态运行，频率范围0-5000 Hz。
innovation: 利用声学传感器在线监测压缩机喘振前兆，通过特定频率尖峰识别失速起始，为混合动力系统提供非侵入式稳定性预警方法。
conclusions: 喘振初期在900、1020和1800 Hz三个频率处出现高幅值声学尖峰，可作为失速/喘振的早期检测指标。
limitations: 仅针对特定混合动力系统，未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动机理，且未进行控制研究。
relevance_reason: 论文研究喘振检测，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但声学方法对叶片流致振动监测有参考价值。

title: Effects of Double-Side Labyrinth Seals on Aerodynamic Performance in a Transonic Shrouded Turbine Stage
abstract: from 3.4% to 1.3% and increases the efficiency by 1.4%, which is the maximum efficiency improvement of all cases. The sealing structures increase the loss inside the shroud while reducing the momentum mixing between shroud leakage flow and mainstream. Therefore, the circumferential distribution of leakage velocity is changed, as well as the distribution of high-loss zones at turbine outlet. Furthermore, the leakage-vortex loss, which is associated with the blockage effect of sealing structure to the tip leakage flow, gains more improvement than the passage-vortex at the rotor outlet section in double-side seal case. In addition, it has also been found that with a larger gap at tip, the double-side seal has better effects of reducing the leakage flow and improving the aerodynamic performance in the transonic turbine stage.

summary_zh: 本文通过数值模拟研究了双面迷宫密封对跨声速带冠涡轮级气动性能的影响。发现双面密封可将泄漏流率从3.4%降至1.3%，效率提升1.4%。密封结构减少了泄漏流与主流的动量掺混，改变了泄漏速度周向分布及出口高损失区分布，且双面密封对泄漏涡损失的改善优于通道涡。
method: 数值仿真（RANS），跨声速涡轮级，带冠转子，双面迷宫密封，不同叶顶间隙工况。
innovation: 首次系统对比双面迷宫密封与单面密封对跨声速涡轮级泄漏流和效率的影响，揭示了密封结构对泄漏涡和通道涡损失的差异化改善机制。
conclusions: 双面迷宫密封使泄漏流率从3.4%降至1.3%，效率提升1.4%；大叶顶间隙下双面密封减漏和增效效果更优。
limitations: 仅针对带冠涡轮，未涉及无冠转子或压气机；未考虑非定常效应及密封结构对叶片振动的影响。
relevance_reason: 论文研究密封结构对涡轮泄漏流和效率的影响，未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动，但与叶尖泄漏流控制相关，对压气机RI-NSV研究有间接参考价值。

title: Sensitivity and Forced Response Analysis of Anisotropy-Mistuned Bladed Disks With Nonlinear Contact Interfaces
abstract: Abstract A new method has been developed for the analysis of nonlinear forced response of bladed disks mistuned by blade anisotropy scatter and for the forced response sensitivity to blade material anisotropy orientations. The approach allows for the calculation of bladed disks with nonlinear friction contact interfaces using the multiharmonic balance method. The method uses efficient high-accuracy model reduction method for the minimization of the computational effort while providing required accuracy. The capabilities of the developed methods are validated and demonstrated using a two-blade model. A thorough study of the influence of the material anisotropy mistuning and its sensitivity on the characteristics of the forced response is carried out using finite element (FE) modes of anisotropy mistuned realistic bladed disk with nonlinear friction joints of blade roots and shroud contacts. The dependency of the nonlinear forced response on excitation level and contact pressure values has been carried out for anisotropy mistuned bladed disks.

venue: Journal of Engineering for Gas Turbines and Power
summary_zh: 本文开发了一种新方法，用于分析由叶片各向异性散布失谐的叶盘非线性强迫响应及其对材料各向异性取向的敏感性。该方法结合多谐波平衡法和高效高精度模型降阶技术，通过两叶片模型验证，并基于真实叶盘有限元模型研究了各向异性失谐对非线性强迫响应的影响，揭示了激励水平和接触压力对响应特性的依赖关系。
method: 数值仿真方法，采用多谐波平衡法处理非线性摩擦接触界面，结合高效模型降阶技术，基于有限元模型分析各向异性失谐叶盘。
innovation: 首次将材料各向异性散布作为失谐源引入叶盘强迫响应分析，并开发了同时考虑非线性接触界面和模型降阶的高效计算方法。
conclusions: 各向异性失谐显著影响叶盘非线性强迫响应特性；响应幅值对激励水平和接触压力敏感，且随各向异性取向变化。
limitations: 仅基于两叶片模型和有限元仿真，缺乏实验验证；未考虑气动弹性耦合效应。
tags: 叶片流致振动预测模型
relevance_reason: 论文研究叶盘失谐下的非线性强迫响应，属于叶片振动控制范畴，但未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动，与RI-NSV机理、预测或控制无直接关联。

title: Influence of Blade Flexibility on the Dynamic Response Simulation of a Turbomolecular Pump on Magnetic Bearings
abstract: Abstract This paper proposes the simulation of a complete mechanical model of a turbomolecular pump rotor, including rotor and blades flexibility, suspended by controlled active magnetic bearings. The mechanical model is composed of an eight stage blisk, attached to a shaft. Magnetic forces are linearized by the first-order Taylor expansion around a given point. Including blades and rotor flexibility makes the mechanical system asymmetric, so the equations of motion for the coupled system have periodic terms. A modal controller was designed to control rigid body modes, since the number of sensors is limited and no state observer is implemented. PID controllers are used for low frequency modes combined with the second order filters to damp high frequency modes. First of all, stability analysis was carried out for the axisymmetric case. Second, blades flexibility was included. Forced response of the whole system to an impulsive force was studied. Divergent responses for the system in rotation were obtained as a second order filter pole possibly interacting with blades modes. Taking the second order filters off the control loop allowed the system to be stable. These results show that the analysis method developed here is efficient to evaluate the performance of a controller in closed loop with the complete flexible system. This method may be used in industrial design processes as computation times for the complete system are very short.

summary_zh: 本文提出了一种包含转子和叶片柔性的涡轮分子泵完整机械模型仿真方法，转子由八级叶盘和轴组成，由主动磁轴承支撑。通过线性化磁力并考虑柔性引起的非对称性，设计了模态控制器和PID控制器。研究发现，二阶滤波器极点可能与叶片模态相互作用导致发散响应，移除滤波器后系统稳定。该方法计算效率高，适用于工业设计。
method: 数值仿真，建立包含叶片和转子柔性的八级叶盘-轴耦合模型，磁力线性化，采用模态控制器和PID控制器，分析脉冲激励下的强迫响应。
innovation: 首次在涡轮分子泵仿真中同时考虑转子和叶片柔性，并评估控制器与完整柔性系统闭环的性能，计算时间短。
conclusions: 1. 二阶滤波器极点与叶片模态相互作用可导致旋转系统发散响应。2. 移除滤波器后系统恢复稳定，表明控制器设计需考虑叶片柔性。
limitations: 未考虑气动载荷，仅针对磁轴承支撑的涡轮分子泵，未涉及风扇/压气机流动不稳定性。
tags: 叶片流致振动预测模型
relevance_reason: 论文研究叶片柔性对转子动力学响应的影响，与风扇/压气机流致振动有参考价值，但未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Analysis of Composite Blade/Casing Rub Stability Through Delayed Differential Equations
abstract: Abstract To improve aerodynamic efficiencies, the clearances between blades and casings are becoming smaller and smaller in the aero-engine industry, which might lead to the interactions between these components. These unexpected interactions are known as the so-called blade/casing rubs. Abradable materials are implemented on the inner surface of the casings to reduce the potential damages caused by it. However, failures may still arise from blade/casing rubs according to experimental investigations and actual accidents. In this paper, a reduced-order delayed differential equations (DDEs) are used to simplify the rubbing process between composite blade and casing. It is assumed that the removal of the abradable material in blade/casing rubbing process shares a resemblance with machine tool chatters encountered in machining. The DDEs are established with centrifugal stiffness and the impacts of stacking sequences on the blade damping taking into consideration. Semidiscretization method (SDM) is used to study the stabilities of the simplified system, which is verified by cluster treatment of characteristic roots (CTCR) and direct integrations. The results show that the stacking sequences, rub positions, blade damping, and stiffness could have much impact on the relatively dangerous interaction regimes. With the help of this method, one can assist the design processes of the composite blade-casing interface in initial aero-engine structural designs.

summary_zh: 本文针对航空发动机复合材料叶片与机匣的碰摩稳定性问题，建立了迟滞微分方程降阶模型，考虑了离心刚度和铺层顺序对阻尼的影响。采用半离散化方法分析系统稳定性，并用特征根聚类法和直接积分验证。结果表明铺层顺序、碰摩位置、叶片阻尼和刚度显著影响危险相互作用区域，可为复合材料叶片-机匣界面设计提供指导。
method: 数值方法：基于迟滞微分方程的降阶模型，采用半离散化方法分析稳定性，并用特征根聚类法和直接积分验证。
innovation: 将复合材料叶片/机匣碰摩过程类比为机床颤振，建立迟滞微分方程模型，并考虑铺层顺序对阻尼的影响。
conclusions: 铺层顺序、碰摩位置、叶片阻尼和刚度对危险相互作用区域有显著影响；该方法可辅助初始航空发动机结构设计中复合材料叶片-机匣界面的设计。
limitations: 仅研究碰摩稳定性，未涉及旋转不稳定性和非同步振动；模型为简化降阶模型，未考虑真实流动效应。
tags: 叶片流致振动抑制/控制
relevance_reason: 论文研究叶片/机匣碰摩稳定性，与风扇/压气机流致振动有参考价值，但未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: On the Effects of Tip Clearance and Operating Condition on the Flow Structures Within an Axial Turbomachine Rotor Passage
abstract: Abstract Effects of tip clearance size and flowrate on the flow around the tip of an axial turbomachine rotor are studied experimentally. Visualizations and stereo-particle image velocimetry (PIV) measurements in a refractive index-matched facility compare the performance, leakage velocity, and the trajectory, growth rate, and strength of the tip leakage vortex (TLV) for gaps of 0.49% and 2.3% of the blade chord, and two flowrates. Enlarging the tip clearance delays the TLV breakup in the aft part of the rotor passage at high flowrates but causes earlier breakup under pre-stall conditions. It also reduces the entrainment of endwall boundary layer vorticity from the separation point where the leakage and passage flows meet. Reducing the flowrate or tip gap shifts the location of the TLV detachment from the blade suction side (SS) upstream to points where the leakage velocity is 70–80% of the tip speed. Once detached, the growth rates of the total shed circulation are similar for all cases, i.e., varying the gap or flowrate mostly shifts the detachment point. The TLV migration away from the SS decreases with an increasing gap but not with the flowrate. Two mechanisms dominate this migration: initially, the leakage jet pushes the TLV away from the blade at 50% of the leakage velocity. Further downstream, the TLV is driven by its image on the other side of the endwall. Differences in migration rate are caused by the smaller distance between the TLV and its image for the narrow gap, and the increase in initial TLV strength with decreasing flowrate and gap.
affiliations: Johns Hopkins University
Department of Mechanical Engineering, Johns Hopkins University, Baltimore, MD 21218
summary_zh: 通过折射率匹配实验和立体PIV，研究了轴流叶轮机械转子叶尖间隙尺寸和流量对叶尖泄漏涡（TLV）结构的影响。发现增大间隙在高流量下延迟TLV破裂，但在近失速条件下导致提前破裂；减小流量或间隙使TLV脱离点前移。TLV迁移由泄漏射流和壁面镜像涡共同驱动。
method: 实验研究：采用折射率匹配设施和立体PIV测量，对比0.49%和2.3%弦长间隙及两种流量下的TLV特性。
innovation: 定量揭示了间隙和流量对TLV脱离点、迁移率及涡量卷吸的影响机制，特别是镜像涡对迁移的驱动作用。
conclusions: 增大间隙使TLV脱离点后移，但近失速时破裂提前；TLV迁移率随间隙增大而减小，主要因窄间隙下TLV与镜像涡距离更小。
limitations: 仅针对单一转子构型，未涉及非定常气动弹性或旋转不稳定性。
relevance_reason: 研究叶尖泄漏涡结构，与近失速扰动相关，但未直接涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Non-Synchronous Aeroacoustic Interaction in an Axial Multi-Stage Compressor
abstract: Abstract Non-engine order rotor blade vibration is an aeroelastic phenomenon of major interest for compressor designers resulting from excitation of rotor blade modes through aerodynamic instabilities. Indicators for a comparable type of instability, caused by propagating acoustic modes, have been observed in an experimental multistage high-speed compressor by Safran Helicopter Engines. It is intended to understand the cause of these instabilities by combining experimental data and numerical simulations. Unsteady pressure measurements were carried out by case-mounted and stator-mounted transducers. Rotor tip-timing and magnet-coil sensor systems were installed to measure the blade vibrations. Experimental results show non-engine order signatures in the unsteady pressure signal coherent to the shifted frequency of blade vibrations. In the present paper, the waveform of these oscillations is analyzed in detail, showing a dominant propagating acoustic mode interacting with vibrations of rotor 2. The root cause for the non-synchronous oscillations is identified as an acoustic mode that is cutoff downstream of rotor 3. During the test, the mode changes its frequency and circumferential order, affecting the amplitude of associated blade vibrations.

summary_zh: 本文通过实验与数值模拟研究多级轴流压气机中非同步气动声学相互作用，发现由传播声模引起的转子叶片非同步振动。实验测量了非整阶次压力信号与叶片振动，识别出主导声模与转子2振动耦合，根源为转子3下游截止的声模，其频率和周向阶次变化影响叶片振幅。
method: 实验测量（机匣/静子安装压力传感器、叶尖定时、磁线圈传感器）结合数值模拟，分析多级高速压气机非同步振动。
innovation: 首次在多级高速压气机中识别出由传播声模引起的非同步振动，并揭示声模截止与频率/周向阶次变化对叶片振幅的影响。
conclusions: 非同步振动由转子3下游截止的声模引起，该声模与转子2振动相互作用；声模频率和周向阶次变化直接影响叶片振动幅值。
limitations: 未提供定量数据（如频率、振幅值），且仅针对特定多级压气机，通用性待验证。
relevance_reason: 直接研究声学诱导的非同步振动（NSV），并揭示其机理（声模截止与耦合），属于RI-NSV机理研究。

title: Radial Decomposition of Blade Vibration to Identify a Stall Flutter Source in a Transonic Fan
abstract: Abstract This paper investigates the three dimensionality of the unsteady flow responsible for stall flutter instability. Nonlinear unsteady Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes (RANS) computations are used to predict the aeroelastic behavior of a fan blade at part speed. Flutter is experienced by the blades at low mass flow for the first flap mode at nodal diameter 2. The maximal energy exchange is located near the tip of the blade, at 90% span. The modeshape is radially decomposed to investigate the main source of instability. This decomposition method is validated for the first time in 3D using a time-marching nonlinear solver. The source of stall flutter is finally found at 65% span where the local vibration induces an unstable oscillation of the shock-wave of large amplitude. This demonstrates that the radial migration of the pressure fluctuations must be taken into account to predict stall flutter.
affiliations: Imperial College London
Department of Mechanical Engineering, Vibration University Technology Centre, Imperial College London, London SW7 2AZ, UK
summary_zh: 本文通过非线性非定常RANS数值模拟，研究跨声速风扇叶片在部分转速下失速颤振的不稳定源。采用径向分解方法分析叶片振动模态，发现最大能量交换位于90%叶高，但颤振源位于65%叶高，由局部振动引起激波大幅振荡导致。
method: 非线性非定常RANS数值模拟，径向分解叶片振动模态，分析能量交换和激波振荡。
innovation: 首次在三维时域非线性求解器中验证径向分解方法，并揭示失速颤振源位于65%叶高而非叶尖。
conclusions: 1. 失速颤振源位于65%叶高，由局部振动引起激波大幅振荡。2. 径向压力波动迁移对预测失速颤振至关重要。
limitations: 仅针对特定风扇和部分转速工况，未考虑非同步振动或旋转不稳定性。
tags: 风扇/压气机叶片气动弹性
relevance_reason: 论文研究失速颤振，属于气动弹性范畴，但未直接涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Boundary-Layer Development Downstream of Normal Shock in Transonic Intakes at Incidence
abstract: The flowfield around five transonic inlet lips at high incidence is investigated for a variety of flow conditions around a design point representative of high-incidence maneuvering. Changes to the operating point are simulated by varying the angle of incidence and the mass flow rate over the lip, which is intended to mimic the effect of an increase in engine flow. For these inflow conditions, the flow on the lip is characterized by a supersonic region, which is terminated by a near-normal shock wave. Of particular interest is the effect of the lip geometry and operating point on the boundary layer at the equivalent fan location. The parametric investigation revealed a significant effect of the lip shape on the position and severity of the shock-wave/boundary-layer interaction. From correlation studies, it appears that the extent of shock-induced separation is the main factor affecting the boundary-layer state downstream of the normal shock-wave/boundary-layer interaction. Somewhat surprisingly, this was found to be independent of shock strength.
affiliations: University of Cambridge
University of Cambridge, Cambridge, England CB2 1PZ, United Kingdom
summary_zh: 针对高攻角下跨声速进气道唇口，通过改变攻角和流量模拟不同工况，研究唇口几何和激波/边界层干扰对风扇位置边界层发展的影响。发现激波诱导分离程度是影响边界层状态的主要因素，且与激波强度无关。
method: 数值仿真，参数化研究不同攻角和流量下五种唇口几何的流场，分析激波/边界层干扰及边界层特性。
innovation: 揭示了唇口几何对激波/边界层干扰位置和严重性的显著影响，并发现激波诱导分离程度独立于激波强度。
conclusions: 1. 唇口形状显著影响激波/边界层干扰的位置和严重性。2. 激波诱导分离程度是影响下游边界层状态的主要因素，且与激波强度无关。
limitations: 仅针对特定设计点的高攻角机动工况，未涵盖宽工况范围；未涉及旋转不稳定性或叶片振动。
relevance_reason: 论文研究进气道畸变对边界层的影响，与风扇/压气机流致振动间接相关，但未涉及RI或NSV。

title: Numerical investigation of flow mechanisms of tandem impeller inside a centrifugal compressor
abstract: This study numerically investigated a single stage centrifugal compressor ‘‘Radiver’’ with a wedge diffuser and several tandem-designed impellers to explore the flow phenomena within the tandem impeller and the potential to enhance compressor performance. The results demonstrate that tandem design and clocking fraction (λs) significantly affects the compressor performance. The compressor stage with tandem impellers of Series A of boundary layer growth interruption alone are observed to have a widely operating range but efficiency and total pressure ratio penalty compared with that of conventional impeller. The tandem impeller with at least the same impeller efficiency as the conventional design is considered as a critical design criteria so that further modification process based on the flow characteristic of tandem impeller is necessary. In order to restrain the inducer wake and exducer shock losses, parameters modification of blade angle and thickness distributions are necessary and the modified tandem impeller of Series B is obtained. The modified tandem impeller with 25% clocking arrangement shows an 8.45% stall margin increase and maintains the total pressure ratio and efficiency as the conventional design, which proves the potential of tandem impeller to improve compressor stage performance. It is noteworthy that the tandem impellers of Radiver have not shown obviously balanced exit flow field and the fundamental mechanism of stall margin extending of tandem impeller lies on the improved impeller/diffuser matching performance resulting from the incidence angle variation at diffuser inlet.

summary_zh: 采用数值方法研究带楔形扩压器的离心压缩机“Radiver”中串联叶轮设计对性能的影响。发现串联设计及分档分数显著影响性能，通过修改叶片角和厚度分布，25%分档的改进串联叶轮使失速裕度增加8.45%，同时保持总压比和效率，机理在于改善叶轮/扩压器匹配。
method: 数值仿真（CFD），研究单级离心压缩机，对比常规叶轮与串联叶轮系列A和B，工况包括不同分档分数。
innovation: 提出串联叶轮设计准则（效率不低于常规），并通过参数修改实现失速裕度提升而不牺牲效率，揭示扩压器进口攻角变化是裕度扩展机理。
conclusions: 改进的串联叶轮（25%分档）使失速裕度增加8.45%，同时保持总压比和效率；串联叶轮未明显改善出口流场均匀性，裕度提升源于扩压器进口攻角变化改善匹配。
limitations: 仅针对特定离心压缩机Radiver，未涉及非定常流动或旋转不稳定性，且未考虑叶片振动。
relevance_reason: 论文研究离心压缩机失速裕度，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但涉及流动控制与稳定性，对风扇/压气机流致振动有参考价值。

title: Successive Aeroacoustic Transfer of Leading Edge Serrations From Single Airfoil to Low-Pressure Fan Application
abstract: Abstract Leading edge serrations are identified as an effective passive treatment for reducing fan broadband noise due to high turbulent inflow conditions. This paper aims to investigate the isolated effect of serrated applications in a rotating frame, covering the aerodynamic and aeroacoustic performance. With this purpose, a serration design, previously analyzed in the rigid domain, is transferred to the rotating frame, following a successive approach in form of a continuous increase of the fan blade number. This is considered as a feasible way to isolate the serration effects and to provide information on fan blade interaction and possible masking effects. Comparing blades with straight and serrated leading edges by analyzing the spectral noise reduction and the overall level result in deep insights in the underlying noise reduction mechanisms. Furthermore, analysis of phase differences by means of the wall pressure fluctuations leads to the identification of rotating flow phenomena, nonsynchronized with the rotor speed. The results obtained indicate an efficient noise reduction by the serrations in the vicinity of the design point. By use of the presented successive approach, noise reduction phenomena observed with the full rotor could be identified to be of either aeroacoustic or aerodynamic nature. A reduced noise is observed for the full rotor case, showing a reduction of blade interaction effects. At reducing flow coefficients, an improved stall margin of the serrated rotor is identified that also affects the aeroacoustic signature.

summary_zh: 研究前缘锯齿从单翼型到低压风扇转子的逐级气动声学传递，通过逐步增加叶片数隔离锯齿效应。实验发现锯齿在近设计点有效降噪，并识别出与转子转速不同步的旋转流动现象。锯齿转子在低流量系数下改善了失速裕度，影响气动声学特征。
method: 实验测量，逐步增加叶片数（从单翼型到全转子），分析壁面压力脉动相位差识别旋转流动现象。
innovation: 采用逐级传递方法隔离锯齿效应，区分气动与声学降噪机制，并识别非同步旋转流动现象。
conclusions: 前缘锯齿在近设计点有效降噪，减少叶片相互作用效应；低流量系数下锯齿转子失速裕度改善，影响气动声学特征。
limitations: 未直接研究旋转不稳定性（RI）与非同步振动（NSV）的机理，仅涉及非同步旋转流动。
relevance_reason: 论文识别了非同步旋转流动现象，与RI-NSV相关，但未直接研究RI导致的NSV机理或控制。

title: Blowing–Suction Control in S-Shaped Inlet and Its Impact on Fan-Stage Performance
abstract: This paper presents a numerical investigation of flow control with blowing and suction in the whole structure consisting of an aggressive S-shaped air intake accompanied by a downstream fan stage. The results show that the effect of blowing–suction flow control is neither the simple summation of the effects of a single blowing control and a suction control nor the simple differences between them. It is the best one among three flow control techniques studied in this paper. The approach to selecting the optimum flow control scheme via simulating the single air intake, and afterward performing the numerical simulation of whole passage, has a certain rationality. With the blowing–suction flow control, the maximum isentropic efficiency and maximum total pressure ratio of the fan stage increase by 2.70 and 3.13%, respectively. Moreover, the rotor of the fan stage has a significant effect in reducing circumferential distortions. Due to the influence of the rotating fan rotor, the low-energy region at the lower side of the cross sections decreases gradually when approaching the fan-stage inlet. The low-energy fluid always exists in several blade passages after it enters the fan stage. Using the blowing–suction flow control, the relative total pressure of fluid in these low-energy passages increases to an extent. Streamlines in the fan stator flow passages and on stator blades show that the blowing–suction flow control in the air intake can improve the fan stator flow pattern, reducing the flow separation in general.

summary_zh: 本文数值研究了S形进气道中吹吸组合流动控制对下游风扇级性能的影响。结果表明，吹吸控制效果优于单独吹气或吸气，可使风扇级最大等熵效率提高2.70%，总压比提高3.13%，并有效降低周向畸变和改善静子流场。
method: 数值仿真（RANS），研究包含S形进气道与风扇级的整机结构，采用吹气、吸气及吹吸组合控制方案。
innovation: 提出通过单独进气道仿真筛选最优控制方案再验证整机的方法，发现吹吸组合的非线性叠加效应。
conclusions: 吹吸控制使风扇级最大等熵效率提升2.70%，总压比提升3.13%；转子可显著降低周向畸变，低能流体进入风扇后集中于少数叶片通道。
limitations: 仅数值研究，未考虑真实进气畸变动态特性及非定常效应。
relevance_reason: 论文关注进气道畸变控制对风扇性能的影响，未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Separation of Up and Downstream Forced Response Excitations of an Embedded Compressor Rotor
abstract: The aerodynamic interaction of upstream and downstream blade rows can have a significant impact on the forced response of the compressor. Previously, the authors carried out the forced response analysis of a three-row stator-rotor-stator (S1-R2-S2) configuration from a 3.5-stage compressor. However, since the stator vane counts in both the stators (S1 and S2) were the same, it was not possible to separate the excitations from both the rows as they excited the rotor at the same frequency. Hence, a new configuration was developed and tested in which the stator 1 blade count was changed to 38 and stator 2 blade count was maintained at 44 in order to study the individual influences of the stator on the embedded rotor. By using this method, the excitations from both rows can be determined, and the excitations can be quantified to determine the row having the maximum influence on the overall forcing. To achieve this, two sets of simulations were carried out. The three-row stator-rotor (S1-R2-S2) simulation was carried out at both the 38EO (engine order) and 44EO crossings at the peak efficiency (PE) operating condition. The two-row stator-rotor analysis (S1-R2) was carried out at the 38EO crossing, and the other two-Row (R2-S2) analyses were carried out at the 44EO crossing. The steady aerodynamics was preserved in both the cases. A study was done to determine the contribution of wave reflections from the stator inlet and exit planes to the forcing function. Two conclusions drawn from this study are as follows: (1) the modal force value decreased after the upstream stator was removed, which proved that wave reflections from this stator were significant and (2) the increase in modal force was in-line with experimental observations.
