summary_zh: 本文研究多排多通道气动相互作用对压气机叶片强迫响应的影响，重点分析结构失谐与气动载荷不对称性的耦合效应。通过子结构技术建立有限元模型，将气动载荷变化视为认知不确定性，分别及联合研究结构失谐与随机气动激励对叶盘动力学的影响，并考虑气弹耦合。
method: 基于准三维多排多通道压气机配置的数值仿真，采用子结构有限元模型，结合随机气动激励的随机描述。
innovation: 提出将多排声学相互作用导致的叶片间气动载荷不对称性视为认知不确定性，并与结构失谐联合分析，避免昂贵多级计算。
conclusions: 1. 多排声学相互作用（Tyler-Sofrin模态）导致叶片间气动载荷显著变化；2. 结构失谐与气动载荷不对称性联合作用会改变叶盘强迫响应特性。
limitations: 研究基于准三维模型，未考虑全三维效应；气动载荷不确定性处理为随机，可能忽略确定性耦合。
tags: 风扇/压气机叶片气动弹性
叶片流致振动预测模型
relevance_reason: 研究压气机叶片强迫响应与气弹耦合，涉及多排声学相互作用，但未直接关联旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Experimental Investigation of Vibrational and Acoustic Phenomena for Detecting the Stall and Surge of a Multistage Compressor
abstract: Nowadays, the operative range limit of compressors is still a key aspect of the research into turbomachinery. In particular, the study of the mass flow rate lower limit represents a significant factor in order to predict and avoid the inception of critical working conditions and instabilities such as stall and surge. The identification of these instabilities and typical precursors of these two phenomena can imply many advantages, in both stationary and aeronautic applications, such as avoiding the loss of production (in industry) and efficiency of systems and reducing the maintenance and repairing cost. Many approaches can be adopted to achieve this target, but one of the most fascinating is the vibro-acoustic analysis of the compressor response during operation. At the Engineering Department of the University of Ferrara, a test bench, dedicated to the study of the performance of an aeronautic turboshaft engine multistage compressor, has been equipped with a high frequency data acquisition system. A set of triaxle accelerometers and microphones, suitable for capturing broad-band vibration and acoustic phenomena, were installed in strategic positions along the compressor and the test rig. A great amount of vibro-acoustic data were first processed through an innovative data analysis technique, and then correlated to the thermodynamic data recorded. Subsequently, the precursor signals of surge were detected and identified demonstrating the reliability of the methodology used for studying compressor instabilities. The experimental data and results offer a valid alternative way of analyzing and detecting unstable compressor behavior characteristics by means of nonintrusive measurements.

summary_zh: 本文通过实验研究多级压气机的失速和喘振，采用振动与声学分析方法，在压气机关键位置安装三轴加速度计和麦克风，采集宽带振动与声学数据，结合创新数据处理技术，成功检测到喘振前兆信号，验证了非侵入式测量在压气机不稳定特性分析中的可靠性。
method: 实验研究，在航空涡轴发动机多级压气机试验台上安装高频数据采集系统，包括三轴加速度计和麦克风，采集振动与声学数据，并与热力学数据关联分析。
innovation: 采用振动与声学联合分析的非侵入式方法，结合创新数据处理技术，从宽带信号中提取喘振前兆，为压气机不稳定检测提供新途径。
conclusions: 1. 振动与声学数据可有效检测喘振前兆信号。2. 非侵入式测量方法在压气机不稳定特性分析中具有可靠性。
limitations: 研究聚焦于喘振检测，未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动等具体机理。
relevance_reason: 论文研究喘振检测，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但振动声学方法对压气机不稳定研究有参考价值。

title: On-Site Identification of Dynamic Annular Seal Forces in Turbo Machinery Using Active Magnetic Bearings: An Experimental Investigation
abstract: Significant dynamic forces can be generated by annular seals in rotordynamics and can under certain conditions destabilize the system leading to a machine failure. Mathematical modeling of dynamic seal forces are still challenging, especially for multiphase fluids and for seals with complex geometries. This results in much uncertainty in the estimation of the dynamic seal forces, which often leads to unexpected system behavior. This paper presents the results of a method suitable for on-site identification of uncertain dynamic annular seal forces in rotordynamic systems supported by active magnetic bearings (AMB). An excitation current is applied through the AMBs to obtain perturbation forces and a system response, from which the seal coefficients are extracted by utilizing optimization and a priori information about the mathematical model structure and its known system dynamics. As a study case, the method is applied to a full-scale test facility supported by two radial AMBs interacting with one annular center-mounted test seal. Specifically, the dynamic behavior of a smooth annular seal with high preswirl and large clearance (worn seal) is investigated in this study for different excitation frequencies and differential pressures across the seal. The seal coefficients are extracted and a global model on reduced state-space modal form is obtained using the identification process. The global model can be used to update the model-based controller to improve the performance of the overall system. This could potentially be implemented in all rotordynamic systems supported by AMBs and subjected to seal forces or other fluid film forces.

summary_zh: 本文提出一种利用主动磁轴承（AMB）在线识别旋转机械中环形密封动态力的方法。通过AMB施加激励电流获取扰动响应，结合优化和先验模型提取密封系数。以高预旋、大间隙（磨损）光滑密封为案例，研究不同激励频率和压差下的动态行为，并建立全局降阶模态模型用于控制器更新。
method: 实验方法：利用AMB施加激励电流，测量系统响应，通过优化和先验模型提取密封系数。工况：不同激励频率和密封压差。
innovation: 提出一种在线识别方法，无需停机即可提取密封动态系数，并建立全局降阶模型用于控制器更新，提高系统性能。
conclusions: 1. 成功提取了高预旋、大间隙光滑密封的动态系数。2. 建立的全局降阶模态模型可用于更新基于模型的控制器，改善系统性能。
limitations: 仅针对单密封、特定工况（高预旋、大间隙），未涉及多相流或复杂几何密封。
relevance_reason: 论文研究密封动态力对转子稳定性的影响，与风扇/压气机RI-NSV无直接关联，但涉及转子动力学和稳定性建模，有间接参考价值。

title: Demonstrating Multistage Compressor Blockage Calculations Using Pressure Measurements for Large Tip Clearances
abstract: With future gas turbine designs seeking increased overall pressure ratios, blade heights in the rear stages of high-pressure compressors are expected to decrease. As this will lead to an increase of relative tip-clearance height, detailed knowledge of the associated rotor tip-leakage flows becomes increasingly important. In particular, the development of blockage due to large tip-leakage flows can be a key component leading to an understanding of stage matching for multistage machines. To assess blockage related to increased tip clearance, a series of measurements are presented here from a three-stage axial compressor at two loading conditions on the 100% corrected speed line. These data correspond to three tip-clearance configurations, up to 4% span. Three-component velocity measurements are used to validate a new blockage calculation technique based on measured steady and time-resolved pressures, and instrumentation techniques that are more robust and require fewer resources than multicomponent velocity tests. Ultimately, these simplified pressure-based blockage calculation techniques yield results that compare well with the velocity-based results, within 2% flow area or better.
affiliations: Purdue University West Lafayette
Purdue University, West Lafayette, Indiana 47907
summary_zh: 针对大叶尖间隙下多级压气机堵塞问题，基于稳态和时均压力测量开发了简化堵塞计算方法，并与三速度分量测量结果对比，误差在2%以内。研究揭示了叶尖泄漏流对堵塞的影响，为多级匹配提供依据。
method: 实验研究：在三台三级轴流压气机上，采用稳态和时均压力测量，结合三速度分量测量验证，工况为100%转速线两种负荷，叶尖间隙达4%展长。
innovation: 提出基于压力测量的简化堵塞计算技术，替代复杂速度测量，资源需求少且鲁棒性强，精度与速度法相当。
conclusions: 1. 基于压力的堵塞计算与速度法结果吻合，误差≤2%流通面积。2. 大叶尖间隙显著影响堵塞发展，对多级匹配至关重要。
limitations: 仅针对特定压气机和两种负荷，未涵盖非定常扰动或失速前兆。
relevance_reason: 论文研究叶尖泄漏流引起的堵塞，与RI-NSV间接相关，但未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Effect of Nonuniform Tip Clearance on the Performance of Transonic Axial Compressors
abstract: Tip leakage significantly affects the axial-compressor performance (i.e., its pressure ratio, peak efficiency, and surge margin). The size of the clearance is one of the most important parameters in compressor design. Generally, the tip clearance is uniform from the leading edge to the trailing edge of the compressor-blade section at the tip. In this paper, the effect of chordwise nonuniform tip clearance on the axial-compressor performance is investigated. In addition, the optimum distribution of clearance size is obtained by employing a surrogate model in conjunction with a multi-objective genetic algorithm for optimization. It is shown that the nonuniform tip clearance can effectively reduce the leakage mass-flow rate and eliminate the flow separation, thus enhancing the overall performance of the compressor. Based on the results of the sensitivity analysis, it is found that the changes in clearance size near the trailing edge of the blade tip contribute more toward the improvement of the compressor efficiency than those obtained by changing the clearance near the leading edge. The Pareto optimal front obtained by employing the multi-objective genetic algorithm shows that the transonic axial compressor with well-designed distributions of tip-clearance size gives 0.64% improvement in peak efficiency and 48.18% enhancement in surge margin.

summary_zh: 本文研究了弦向非均匀叶尖间隙对跨声速轴流压气机性能的影响，通过代理模型结合多目标遗传算法优化间隙分布。结果表明，非均匀间隙可有效减少泄漏流量并消除流动分离，使峰值效率提升0.64%，喘振裕度提高48.18%。
method: 数值仿真（代理模型+多目标遗传算法优化），工况为跨声速轴流压气机设计点及近失速点。
innovation: 首次系统研究弦向非均匀叶尖间隙分布对压气机性能的影响，并通过优化获得最佳分布，显著提升喘振裕度。
conclusions: 非均匀叶尖间隙可减少泄漏流量并消除流动分离；优化后峰值效率提升0.64%，喘振裕度提高48.18%。
limitations: 仅针对单一跨声速压气机，未考虑非定常效应及旋转不稳定性。
relevance_reason: 论文研究叶尖间隙对压气机性能及喘振裕度的影响，与RI-NSV涉及的叶尖泄漏流相关，但未直接研究旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Mistuned Higher-Order Mode Forced Response of an Embedded Compressor Rotor—Part II: Mistuned Forced Response Prediction
abstract: This paper is the second part of a two-part paper that presents a comprehensive study of the higher-order mode (HOM) mistuned forced response of an embedded rotor blisk in a multistage axial research compressor. The resonant response of the second-stage rotor (R2) in its first chordwise bending (1CWB) mode due to the second harmonic of the periodic passing of its neighboring stators (S1 and S2) is investigated computationally and experimentally at three steady loading conditions in the Purdue three-stage compressor research facility. A nonintrusive stress measurement system (NSMS, or blade tip-timing) is used to measure the blade vibration. Two reduced-order mistuning models of different levels of fidelity are used, namely, the fundamental mistuning model (FMM) and the component mode mistuning (CMM), to predict the response. Although several modes in the 1CWB modal family appear in frequency veering and high modal density regions, they do not heavily participate in the response such that very similar results are produced by the FMM and the CMM models of different sizes. A significant response amplification factor of 1.5–2.0 is both measured and predicted, which is on the same order of magnitude of what was commonly reported for low-frequency modes. In this study, a good agreement between predictions and measurements is achieved for the deterministic analysis. This is complemented by a sensitivity analysis which shows that the mistuned system is highly sensitive to the discrepancies in the experimentally determined blade frequency mistuning.

summary_zh: 本文是两篇系列论文的第二部分，研究了多级轴流压气机中嵌入转子叶盘的高阶模态失谐强迫响应。通过实验和计算，分析了第二级转子在1CWB模态下因相邻静子谐波引起的共振响应，使用叶尖定时测量振动，并采用FMM和CMM两种降阶失谐模型进行预测。结果表明，响应放大因子为1.5-2.0，与低频模态相当，且预测与实验吻合良好。
method: 数值仿真与实验测量结合，使用叶尖定时系统，在普渡大学三级压气机实验台上进行三个稳态工况测试，采用FMM和CMM降阶模型预测。
innovation: 针对高阶模态失谐强迫响应，验证了降阶模型在频率转向和高模态密度区域的适用性，并进行了灵敏度分析。
conclusions: 1. 响应放大因子为1.5-2.0，与低频模态相当；2. 失谐系统对实验确定的叶片频率失谐差异高度敏感。
limitations: 仅针对特定转子叶盘和模态，未涉及非同步振动或旋转不稳定性。
tags: 叶片流致振动预测模型
relevance_reason: 研究失谐强迫响应，与NSV无直接关联，但涉及叶片振动预测模型和实验方法，对气动弹性研究有参考价值。

title: Full-Annulus Simulation of Nonsynchronous Blade Vibration Excitation of an Axial Compressor
abstract: A high speed 1–1/2 axial compressor stage is simulated in this paper using an unsteady Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes (URANS) solver for a full-annulus configuration to capture its nonsynchronous vibration (NSV) flow excitation with rigid blades. A third-order weighted essentially nonoscillatory scheme for the inviscid flux and a second-order central differencing for the viscous terms are used to resolve nonlinear unsteady fluid flows. A fully conservative rotor/stator sliding boundary condition (BC) is employed with multiple-processor capability for rotor/stator sliding interface that accurately captures unsteady wake propagation between the rotor and stator blades while conserving fluxes across the rotor/stator interfaces. The predicted dominant frequencies using the blade tip response signals are not harmonic to the engine order, which is the NSV excitation. The simulation is based on a rotor blade with a 1.1% tip-chord clearance. Comparison with the previous 1/7 annulus simulations show that the time-shifted phase-lag BCs used in the 1/7 annulus are accurate. For most of the blades, the NSV excitation frequency is 6.2% lower than the measurement in the rig test, although some blades displayed slightly different NSV excitation frequencies. The simulation confirms that the NSV is a full annulus phenomenon. The instability of the circumferential traveling vortices in the vicinity of the rotor tip due to the strong interaction of incoming flow is the main cause of the NSV excitation. This instability is present in all blades of the rotor annulus. For circumferentially averaged parameters like total pressure ratio, NSV is observed to have an effect on the radial profile, particularly at radial locations above 70% span. A design with a lower loading of the upper blade span and a higher loading of the midblade spans is recommended to mitigate or remove NSV.

summary_zh: 采用全环非定常RANS模拟高速轴流压气机级，捕捉刚性叶片的非同步振动（NSV）激励。发现NSV为全环现象，由叶尖周向传播涡的不稳定性引起，预测频率比实验低6.2%。建议降低上叶展载荷以抑制NSV。
method: 全环URANS数值模拟，使用三阶WENO格式和二阶中心差分，转子/静子滑移界面，叶尖间隙1.1%弦长。
innovation: 首次采用全环模拟验证NSV的全环特性，并揭示叶尖周向传播涡不稳定性是主因，优于1/7扇区相位延迟边界条件。
conclusions: NSV激励频率比实验低6.2%，且为全环现象；叶尖周向传播涡不稳定性是主因；建议降低上叶展载荷。
limitations: 仅模拟刚性叶片，未考虑叶片弹性变形；仅针对单一间隙和工况。
relevance_reason: 直接研究NSV的机理（叶尖涡不稳定性）和预测（全环模拟），与RI-NSV机理高度相关。

title: Influence of Rotor Tip Blockage on Near Stall Blade Vibrations in an Axial Compressor Rig
abstract: Rotor blade vibrations observed in the Darmstadt transonic compressor rig are investigated in this paper. The vibrations are nonsynchronous and occur in the near stall (NS) operating region. Rotor tip flow fluctuations traveling near the leading edge (LE) against the direction of rotation (in the rotor relative frame of reference) with about 50% blade tip speed are found to be the reason for the occurrence of the vibrations. The investigations show that the blockage at the rotor tip is an important factor for the aeroelastic stability of the compressor in the NS region. It is found that by application of a recirculating tip injection (TI) casing treatment, the aeroelastic stability increases as a result of reduced blockage in the rotor tip region.

summary_zh: 本文研究达姆施塔特跨声速压气机转子在近失速工况下的非同步叶片振动，发现转子叶尖前缘附近以约50%叶尖速度逆旋转方向传播的流动波动是振动原因，并指出叶尖堵塞是影响气弹稳定性的关键因素。采用再循环叶尖射流机匣处理可降低堵塞，提高气弹稳定性。
method: 实验测量，在跨声速压气机试验台上进行近失速工况下的叶片振动和流动测量，并应用再循环叶尖射流机匣处理。
innovation: 首次明确叶尖堵塞作为近失速区气弹稳定性的关键因素，并通过机匣处理降低堵塞来抑制非同步振动。
conclusions: 1. 转子叶尖前缘附近逆旋转方向传播的流动波动（约50%叶尖速度）导致非同步振动。2. 再循环叶尖射流机匣处理通过降低叶尖堵塞提高了气弹稳定性。
limitations: 仅针对特定跨声速压气机，未涉及不同转速或几何参数的影响。
relevance_reason: 论文直接研究非同步振动（NSV）及其控制，但未明确提及旋转不稳定性（RI）术语。

title: Periodic Unsteady Tip Clearance Vortex Development in a Low-Speed Axial Research Compressor at Different Tip Clearances
abstract: Since the early work on axial compressors, the penalties due to radial clearances between blades and side walls are known and are an ongoing focus of research work. The periodic unsteadiness of the tip clearance vortex (TCV), due to its interaction with the stator wakes, has only rarely been addressed in research papers so far. The current work presents experimental and numerical results from a four-stage low-speed research compressor (LSRC) modeling a state-of-the-art compressor design. Time-resolved experimental measurements have been carried out at three different rotor tip clearances (gap to tip chord: 1.5%, 2.2%, 3.7%) to cover the third rotor's casing static pressure and exit flow field. These results are compared with either steady simulations using different turbulence models or harmonic Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes (RANS) calculations to discuss the periodical unsteady TCV development at different clearance heights. The prediction of the local tip leakage flow is clearly improved by the explicit algebraic Reynolds stress model (EARSM) turbulence model compared to the standard shear stress transport (SST) model. The harmonic RANS calculations (using the SST model) improve the prediction of time-averaged pressure rise and are used to analyze the rotor stator interaction in detail. The interaction of the rotor tip flow field with the passing stator wakes causes a segmentation of the TCV and results in a sinusoidal variation in blockage downstream the rotor row.

summary_zh: 本文通过实验和数值方法研究低速轴流压气机不同叶尖间隙下叶尖泄漏涡的周期性非定常发展。实验测量了三种间隙（1.5%、2.2%、3.7%弦长）的机匣静压和出口流场，并与稳态及谐波RANS计算对比。发现叶尖涡与静子尾迹相互作用导致涡分段和下游堵塞正弦变化。
method: 实验测量（时均及时间分辨）与数值仿真（稳态RANS、谐波RANS），采用EARSM和SST湍流模型，工况为三种叶尖间隙（1.5%、2.2%、3.7%弦长）。
innovation: 首次详细研究不同叶尖间隙下叶尖泄漏涡与静子尾迹的周期性相互作用，并采用谐波RANS方法改善非定常预测。
conclusions: 叶尖泄漏涡与静子尾迹相互作用导致涡分段，下游堵塞呈正弦变化；EARSM模型比SST模型更准确预测局部叶尖泄漏流。
limitations: 仅针对低速压气机，未涉及高速或跨音速工况；未直接研究旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。
relevance_reason: 论文研究叶尖泄漏涡的非定常发展，与旋转不稳定性相关，但未直接涉及非同步振动或RI-NSV机理。

title: StreamVane Turbofan Inlet Swirl Distortion Generator: Mean Flow and Turbulence Structure
abstract: Engine/airframe integration in advanced aircraft concepts must account for nonuniform flows ingested by turbofan engines. In this work, flow details from a vane-based distortion generator were analyzed for turbulence structure and aerodynamic scaling of the mean flow. Experimental results were obtained using particle image velocimetry in a small-scale facility and a full-scale research turbofan engine for the same vane geometry. Tests were performed at nearly the same Mach number to isolate Reynolds number effects, but analysis and prior work indicate that the flow development downstream of the vanes is Mach number independent in the subsonic regime. As hypothesized from inviscid vortex dynamics, the secondary mean flow angles were consistent across scales, indicating Reynolds number independence of the large-scale secondary flow profile generated. Vane wakes produced a complex structure in the streamwise velocity component not seen in the streamwise vorticity, which resembles the distribution from the desired secondary flow profile. The most intense turbulence is concentrated in the outer radial regions of the duct and, as shown by contrast to vane wake-dominated regions, is dominated by shear flow turbulence and unsteadiness due to the distortion profile itself rather than vane wakes. Taken together, these results provide fundamental understanding of the aerodynamics of swirling flows needed for implementing complex turning vanes in the design of distortion generators.
affiliations: Virginia Tech
Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University, Blacksburg, Virginia 24061-0203
summary_zh: 本文通过小尺度设施和全尺寸涡扇发动机实验，利用粒子图像测速技术研究了基于叶片的畸变发生器（StreamVane）产生的进气旋流畸变。分析了平均流和湍流结构，发现二次流角与雷诺数无关，湍流集中在管道外径区域，由畸变轮廓本身主导而非叶片尾迹。
method: 实验测量：小尺度设施和全尺寸研究涡扇发动机中采用粒子图像测速（PIV），相同叶片几何，相近马赫数，隔离雷诺数效应。
innovation: 揭示了旋流畸变发生器中二次流角的雷诺数无关性，并区分了畸变轮廓与叶片尾迹对湍流的贡献，为畸变发生器设计提供了基础理解。
conclusions: 1. 二次流角在不同尺度下一致，表明大尺度二次流剖面与雷诺数无关。2. 最强烈湍流集中在管道外径区域，由畸变轮廓本身而非叶片尾迹主导。
limitations: 仅研究了稳态畸变，未涉及动态畸变或旋转不稳定性；未直接连接叶片振动或非同步振动。
relevance_reason: 论文研究进气畸变对流动结构的影响，与RI-NSV机理无直接关联，但畸变进气可能诱发非定常流动，对风扇/压气机流致振动有参考价值。

title: Experimental/Numerical Study of Ducted-Fan Noise: Effect of Duct Inlet Shape
abstract: The paper presents an investigation of flow and noise produced by the generic fan of an environmental control system installed in a circular duct, with a focus on the evaluation of the effect of mean flow distortions and elevated turbulence levels upstream of the fan, which are here created by replacing a baseline smooth bell-mouth duct inlet by inlets with a rectangular-to-circular transition of the duct cross section and with a T junction formed by two circular pipes. The study includes both experiments, which are aimed primarily at supplying data for a validation of simulation approaches and numerical simulations based on a hybrid Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes/large-eddy simulation approach. An acoustic modal decomposition of the measured and computed unsteady pressure fields is then carried out, which allows extracting “pure” (with filtered out hydrodynamic/turbulent fluctuations) acoustic modes propagating upstream and downstream under reflection-free conditions. A comparison with the experiment is performed for both the “raw” pressure spectra on the duct walls and the extracted individual acoustic modes. It is shown that, in terms of acoustics, a replacement of the clean inlet by the rectangular/circular one is almost neutral, whereas the T-junction inlet causes a strong noise penalty.

summary_zh: 本文通过实验和混合RANS/LES数值模拟，研究了环境控制系统管道风扇的流动与噪声，重点评估了上游畸变进气和湍流的影响。采用矩形-圆形过渡和T型接头进气道，对比了光滑钟形进气口。声模态分解提取了纯声学模态，发现T型接头导致显著噪声增加。
method: 实验测量与混合RANS/LES数值模拟结合，采用声模态分解分析管道壁面压力谱和声模态。工况包括三种进气道形状：光滑钟形、矩形-圆形过渡、T型接头。
innovation: 通过声模态分解从非定常压力场中提取纯声学模态，在无反射条件下分离上下游传播模态，量化了畸变进气对风扇噪声的贡献。
conclusions: 1. 矩形-圆形过渡进气道对噪声影响中性；2. T型接头进气道导致强噪声惩罚，表明畸变进气显著增加噪声。
limitations: 仅针对环境控制系统风扇，未涉及压气机旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。
relevance_reason: 论文研究畸变进气对风扇噪声的影响，与RI-NSV机理无直接关联，但畸变进气是RI的诱因之一，具有参考价值。

title: Influence of Acoustic Blockage on Flutter Instability in a Transonic Nozzle
abstract: In order to predict oscillating loads on a structure, time-linearized methods are fast enough to be routinely used in design and optimization steps of a turbomachine stage. In this work, frequency-domain time-linearized Navier–Stokes computations are proposed to predict the unsteady separated flow generated by an oscillating bump in a transonic nozzle. The influence of regressive pressure waves on the aeroelastic stability is investigated. This case is representative of flutter of a compressor blade submitted to downstream stator potential effects. The influence of frequency is first investigated on a generic oscillating bump to identify the most unstable configuration. Introducing backward traveling pressure waves, it is then showed that aeroelastic stability of the system depends on the phase shift between the wave's source and the bump motion. Finally, feasibility of active control through backward traveling pressure waves is evaluated. The results show a high stabilizing effect even for low amplitude, opening new perspectives for the active control of choke flutter.

summary_zh: 采用频域时域线性化Navier-Stokes方法，研究跨声速喷管中振荡凸块引起的非定常分离流，分析后向压力波对气动弹性稳定性的影响。发现系统稳定性取决于波源与凸块运动的相位差，低幅值后向波具有高稳定化效应，为主动控制节流颤振提供新思路。
method: 频域时域线性化Navier-Stokes数值模拟，研究振荡凸块在跨声速喷管中的非定常分离流，分析频率和压力波相位影响。
innovation: 首次揭示后向压力波相位对气动弹性稳定性的关键作用，并验证低幅值后向波主动控制节流颤振的可行性。
conclusions: 1. 系统稳定性强烈依赖于后向压力波与凸块运动的相位差；2. 低幅值后向波可显著提高稳定性，为主动控制颤振提供新途径。
limitations: 仅针对二维喷管简化模型，未考虑真实叶轮机械三维效应及多叶片耦合。
tags: 风扇/压气机叶片气动弹性
relevance_reason: 研究声学波对颤振稳定性的影响，与风扇/压气机中声学诱导叶片振动相关，但未直接涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Stability and Sensitivity Analysis of Hydrodynamic Instabilities in Industrial Swirled Injection Systems
abstract: The hydrodynamic instability in an industrial, two-staged, counter-rotative, swirled injector of highly complex geometry is under investigation. Large eddy simulations (LES) show that the complicated and strongly nonparallel flow field in the injector is superimposed by a strong precessing vortex core (PVC). Mean flow fields of LES, validated by experimental particle image velocimetry (PIV) measurements, are used as input for both local and global linear stability analysis (LSA). It is shown that the origin of the instability is located at the exit plane of the primary injector. Mode shapes of both global and local LSA are compared to dynamic mode decomposition (DMD) based on LES snapshots, showing good agreement. The estimated frequencies for the instability are in good agreement with both the experiment and the simulation. Furthermore, the adjoint mode shapes retrieved by the global approach are used to find the best location for periodic forcing in order to control the PVC.

summary_zh: 本研究针对工业双级反向旋转旋流喷射器中的流体动力学不稳定性，采用大涡模拟（LES）和线性稳定性分析（LSA）结合实验验证，发现不稳定性源于主喷射器出口平面，并识别出强进动涡核（PVC）。通过全局和局部LSA与动态模态分解（DMD）对比，频率预测与实验和模拟吻合良好，并利用伴随模态确定周期性激励的最佳位置以控制PVC。
method: 大涡模拟（LES）与粒子图像测速（PIV）实验验证，结合局部和全局线性稳定性分析（LSA）及动态模态分解（DMD），工况为工业复杂几何双级反向旋转旋流喷射器。
innovation: 将全局线性稳定性分析与伴随模态应用于工业复杂旋流喷射器，实现PVC的定位与控制，并与LES和实验验证。
conclusions: 1. 不稳定性起源于主喷射器出口平面，PVC是主要模态。2. 全局和局部LSA预测的频率与实验和LES一致，伴随模态可用于确定控制激励位置。
limitations: 研究限于旋流喷射器，未涉及旋转不稳定性（RI）与非同步振动（NSV）的直接关联。
relevance_reason: 论文研究旋流喷射器中的流体动力学不稳定性（PVC），与旋转不稳定性（RI）相关，但未涉及非同步振动（NSV）或叶片振动。

title: Computational Model for Stall Inception and Nonlinear Evolution in Axial Flow Compressors
abstract: This paper presents a computational model for axial compressor stall inception and its nonlinear evolution using unsteady Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes equations as an initial boundary value problem. The initial disturbance with the most unstable mode is obtained by a stall inception eigenvalue approach. To validate this computational model, several unsteady inlet boundary conditions with different frequencies are used as initial perturbations for full-annulus unsteady simulations of a transonic compressor rotor flow. Results reveal that the disturbance with the frequency near the most unstable mode can stimulate the objective rotating stall behavior, whereas the disturbances with the frequencies further away from the former cannot. The flow mechanism of rotating stall in a typical stalled case is also analyzed. It is found that severe tip clearance spillage and backflow form the stall inception disturbance, accompanied by a typical spike-type precursor. Based on comparison and analysis for different simulation examples, the present computational model provides a fast and reliable route to implement nonlinear simulation of compressor rotating stall.

Shanghai Jiao Tong University

summary_zh: 本文提出了一种基于非定常RANS方程的轴流压气机失速起始与非线性演化计算模型，通过失速起始特征值方法获取最不稳定模态作为初始扰动，对跨声速转子进行全环非定常仿真。发现接近最不稳定模态频率的扰动能激发旋转失速，而远离者不能；失速起始伴随叶尖间隙溢流和回流，形成典型尖峰型前兆。该模型为压气机旋转失速的非线性仿真提供了快速可靠途径。
method: 数值仿真：基于非定常RANS方程的全环非定常模拟，采用失速起始特征值方法获取初始扰动，研究不同频率入口扰动对跨声速转子旋转失速的影响。
innovation: 将失速起始特征值方法与全环非定常RANS仿真结合，通过最不稳定模态频率的扰动激发失速，提供了一种快速实现旋转失速非线性仿真的途径。
conclusions: 1. 接近最不稳定模态频率的扰动能激发旋转失速，而远离者不能；2. 失速起始扰动由严重叶尖间隙溢流和回流形成，伴随典型尖峰型前兆。
limitations: 仅针对单转子跨声速压气机，未考虑多排叶片相互作用及非均匀进气影响。
relevance_reason: 论文研究旋转失速起始与非线性演化，涉及叶尖泄漏流和尖峰型前兆，与RI-NSV机理有间接关联，但未直接研究非同步振动。

title: Fan Similarity Model for the Fan–Intake Interaction Problem
abstract: Very high bypass ratio turbofans with large fan tip diameter are an effective way of improving the propulsive efficiency of civil aero-engines. Such engines, however, require larger and heavier nacelles, which partially offset any gains in specific fuel consumptions. This drawback can be mitigated by adopting thinner walls for the nacelle and by shortening the intake section. This binds the success of very high bypass ratio technologies to the problem of designing an intake with thin lips and short diffuser section, which is well matched to a low speed fan. Consequently, the prediction of the mutual influence between the fan and the intake flow represents a crucial step in the design process. Considerable effort has been devoted in recent years to the study of models for the effects of the fan on the lip stall characteristics and the operability of the whole installation. The study of such models is motivated by the wish to avoid the costs incurred by full, three-dimensional (3D) computational fluid dynamics (CFD) computations. The present contribution documents a fan model for fan–intake computations based on the solution of the double linearization problem for unsteady, transonic flow past a cascade of aerofoils with finite mean load. The computation of the flow in the intake is reduced to a steady problem, whereas the computation of the flow in the fan is reduced to one steady problem and a set of solutions of the linearized model in the frequency domain. The nature of the approximations introduced in the fan representation is such that numerical solutions can be computed inexpensively, while the main feature of the flow in the fan passage, namely the shock system and an approximation of the unsteady flow encountered by the fan are retained. The model is applied to a well-documented test case and compares favorably with much more expensive 3D, time-domain computations.

summary_zh: 针对大涵道比涡扇发动机短舱进气道与风扇的相互作用问题，提出一种基于双线性化非定常跨声速叶栅流动求解的风扇相似模型。该模型将进气道流动简化为稳态问题，风扇流动简化为一个稳态问题加频域线性化求解，在保留激波系统和非定常流动近似的同时大幅降低计算成本。应用于标准算例，与三维时域计算吻合良好。
method: 数值方法：基于双线性化非定常跨声速叶栅流动模型，将风扇-进气道耦合分解为稳态和频域线性化问题。工况参数未明确，但针对大涵道比风扇。
innovation: 提出一种低成本的线性化风扇模型，用于风扇-进气道相互作用计算，在保留激波和非定常特征的同时避免全三维时域计算的高成本。
conclusions: 1. 所提线性化模型能有效预测风扇-进气道相互作用，与三维时域结果吻合良好。2. 模型计算成本远低于全三维时域方法。
limitations: 模型基于线性化假设，可能无法准确捕捉强非线性效应如旋转不稳定性。
tags: 风扇/压气机叶片气动弹性
relevance_reason: 论文研究风扇-进气道相互作用中的非定常流动，涉及激波和线性化模型，与RI-NSV机理有间接关联，但未直接研究旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: An Investigation of the Stability Enhancement of a Centrifugal Compressor Stage Using a Porous Throat Diffuser
abstract: The stable operating range of a centrifugal compressor stage of an engine turbocharger is limited at low mass flow rates by aerodynamic instabilities which can lead to the onset of rotating stall or surge. There have been many techniques employed to increase the stable operating range of centrifugal compressor stages. The literature demonstrates that there are various possibilities for adding special treatments to the nominal diffuser vane geometry, or including injection or bleed flows to modify the diffuser flow field in order to influence diffuser stability. One such treatment is the porous throat diffuser (PTD). Although the benefits of this technique have been proven in the existing literature, a comprehensive understanding of how this technique operates is not yet available. This paper uses experimental measurements from a high pressure ratio (PR) compressor stage to acquire a sound understanding of the flow features within the vaned diffuser which affect the stability of the overall compression system and investigate the stabilizing mechanism of the porous throat diffuser. The nonuniform circumferential pressure imposed by the asymmetric volute is experimentally and numerically examined to understand if this provides a preferential location for stall inception in the diffuser. The following hypothesis is confirmed: linking of the diffuser throats via the side cavity equalizes the diffuser throat pressure, thus creating a more homogeneous circumferential pressure distribution, which delays stall inception to lower flow rates. The results of the porous throat diffuser configuration are compared to a standard vaned diffuser compressor stage in terms of overall compressor performance parameters, circumferential pressure nonuniformity at various locations through the compressor stage and diffuser subcomponent analysis. The diffuser inlet region was found to be the element most influenced by the porous throat diffuser, and the stability limit is mainly governed by this element.

summary_zh: 本研究通过实验测量和数值仿真，探究了多孔喉道扩压器（PTD）对高压比离心压气机级稳定性的增强机制。发现PTD通过侧腔连通扩压器喉道，均匀化周向压力分布，从而延迟失速起始至更低流量。扩压器进口区域是受PTD影响最大的元件，并主导稳定性极限。
method: 实验测量与数值仿真结合，研究对象为高压比离心压气机级，包含非对称蜗壳和可调扩压器。
innovation: 揭示了多孔喉道扩压器通过侧腔均匀化喉道压力从而延迟失速的机理，并确认了非对称蜗壳引起的周向压力不均匀性对失速起始位置的影响。
conclusions: 1. PTD通过侧腔连通扩压器喉道，均匀化周向压力分布，延迟失速起始至更低流量。2. 扩压器进口区域是稳定性主导元件。
limitations: 未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动，仅关注失速/喘振稳定性。
relevance_reason: 论文研究机匣处理（多孔喉道扩压器）对离心压气机稳定性的影响，未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动，但机匣处理与流动控制对RI-NSV有参考价值。

title: Characterization of Cavitation Instabilities in a Four-Bladed Turbopump Inducer
abstract: Rocket engine turbopump inducers can suffer from cavitation instabilities, dramatically limiting performance and life of the turbomachinery components. An unrestricted inducer geometry, representative of the Space Shuttle main engine low-pressure oxidizer pump inducer, is defined and serves as a platform for characterization of the cavitation dynamics. Experiments demonstrate rotating cavitation, alternate blade cavitation, and cavitation surge. Borrowing ideas from the modeling and assessment of rotating stall in aeroengine compressors, a previously established traveling wave energy analysis is applied. At flow coefficients higher than design, a single cell cavity occurs rotating at supersynchronous frequencies between 1.2 and 1.5 times rotor frequency. Optical measurements corroborate the findings and underlying mechanisms; the onset of rotating cavitation is governed by the interaction of the blade cavity with the leading edge of the adjacent blade. This leads to a change of incidence, which causes sheet cavity breakoff with periodic growth and collapse of cavities, yielding the apparent supersynchronous rotation of the cavities around the annulus. The paper breaks new ground in diagnostics of inducer dynamic behavior during rotating cavitation, alternate blade cavitation, and cavitation surge. The details of the unrestricted inducer geometry are provided for advancement of international research on rocket engine cavitation dynamics.

summary_zh: 针对四叶片涡轮泵诱导轮，实验研究了旋转空化、交替叶片空化和空化喘振。借鉴航空发动机压气机旋转失速的建模方法，应用行波能量分析。发现高流量系数下出现超同步旋转空化，由叶片空泡与相邻叶片前缘相互作用导致攻角变化引起。
method: 实验测量结合行波能量分析，工况包括设计点及高于设计点的流量系数。
innovation: 将航空发动机旋转失速的行波能量分析方法应用于诱导轮空化不稳定性诊断，揭示了旋转空化的超同步频率机制。
conclusions: 旋转空化发生在高于设计流量系数时，频率为转子频率的1.2~1.5倍；其机理是叶片空泡与相邻叶片前缘相互作用导致攻角变化和空泡脱落。
limitations: 仅针对特定诱导轮几何，未涉及非定常气动弹性或叶片振动控制。
relevance_reason: 研究旋转空化不稳定性，与旋转不稳定性RI相关，但未涉及非同步振动NSV或叶片振动控制。

title: Redesign of a Compressor Stage for a High-Performance Electric Supercharger in a Heavily Downsized Engine
abstract: Engine downsizing is a modern solution for the reduction of CO2 emissions from internal combustion engines. This technology has been gaining increasing attention from industry. In order to enable a downsized engine to operate properly at low speed conditions, it is essential to have a compressor stage with very good surge margin. The ported shroud, also known as the casing treatment, is a conventional way used in turbochargers to widen the working range. However, the ported shroud works effectively only at pressure ratios higher than 3:1. At lower pressure ratio, its advantages for surge margin enhancements are very limited. The variable inlet guide vanes are also a solution to this problem. By adjusting the setting angles of variable inlet guide vanes, it is possible to shift the compressor map toward the smaller flow rates. However, this would also undermine the stage efficiency, require extra space for installing the inlet guide vanes, and add costs. The best solution is therefore to improve the design of impeller blade itself to attain high aerodynamic performances and wide operating ranges. This paper reports a recent study of using inverse design method for the redesign of a centrifugal compressor stage used in an electric supercharger, including the impeller blade and volute. The main requirements were to substantially increase the stable operating range of the compressor in order to meet the demands of the downsized engine. The three-dimensional (3D) inverse design method was used to optimize the impeller geometry and achieve higher efficiency and stable operating range. The predicted performance map shows great advantages when compared with the existing design. To validate the computational fluid dynamics (CFD) results, this new compressor stage has also been prototyped and tested. It will be shown that the CFD predictions have very good agreement with experiments and the redesigned compressor stage has improved the pressure ratio, aerodynamic efficiency, choke, and surge margins considerably.

summary_zh: 针对小型化发动机电动增压器离心压气机级，采用三维反设计方法优化叶轮和蜗壳，以扩大稳定工作范围。数值预测与实验验证表明，新设计显著提高了压比、效率、堵塞和喘振裕度。
method: 三维反设计方法优化叶轮几何，结合CFD数值模拟与实验测试，工况涵盖低到高压比范围。
innovation: 采用反设计方法同时优化叶轮和蜗壳，在低压比下有效提升喘振裕度，优于传统机匣处理。
conclusions: 新设计压比和效率显著提升，喘振裕度大幅改善；CFD预测与实验吻合良好。
limitations: 未涉及非定常流动或旋转不稳定性机理，仅关注稳态性能。
relevance_reason: 论文研究机匣处理和叶片改型以改善喘振裕度，但未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Effects of Tip Clearance on Stall Inception in a Multistage Compressor
abstract: Rotor tip clearance height and the associated tip leakage flow have a significant effect on the performance and stability of compressors. Existing studies considering tip clearance effects on stability have been primarily limited to low-speed compressors, and many of these evaluated single-stage machines, which may not adequately represent stall trends for engine-scale compressors. Furthermore, test campaigns for engine-scale compressors cannot provide instrumentation accessibility required for detailed stage performance and stall investigations. Using results collected from a three-stage intermediate-speed axial compressor with appreciable density rise, this study addresses these needs. In this paper, three rotor tip clearances are tested, ranging from 1.5 to 4% span (1 to 3% chord). Previous studies have primarily shown a transition from short-length-scale spikes to long-length-scale modes as the clearance is increased, whereas the present study shows the opposite: a transition from modes to spikes with increased tip clearance. As a result, these data emphasize that a definitive trend does not exist between the stall inception mechanism and increasing tip clearance. Instead, the clearance effects alter stage matching with speed and change the stall inception mechanism. These results also elicit future research by preliminarily suggesting that stall inception mechanisms may be predictable from steady performance measurements collected in the stalling stage.

summary_zh: 本文实验研究三级中速轴流压气机中不同叶尖间隙（1.5%-4%叶高）对失速起始机制的影响。发现随间隙增大，失速起始从模态波转变为突尖型，与以往低速单级研究相反，表明间隙效应改变级间匹配并影响失速机制。
method: 实验研究，三级中速轴流压气机，测试三种叶尖间隙（1.5%-4%叶高，1%-3%弦长），采集稳态性能与动态压力数据。
innovation: 发现随叶尖间隙增大失速起始从模态波转变为突尖型，与以往低速单级研究趋势相反，强调失速机制与间隙关系非唯一。
conclusions: 1. 叶尖间隙增大导致失速起始从模态波转变为突尖型。2. 间隙效应通过改变级间匹配影响失速机制，而非直接决定。
limitations: 仅针对中速三级压气机，未涉及高速发动机级，且未直接研究非同步振动。
relevance_reason: 研究叶尖间隙对失速起始机制的影响，与旋转不稳定性和非同步振动的机理相关，但未直接涉及NSV。

title: Experimental and Numerical Investigation of a Circumferential Groove Casing Treatment in a Low-Speed Axial Research Compressor at Different Tip Clearances
abstract: The demand of increasing pressure ratios for modern high pressure compressors leads to decreasing blade heights in the last stages. As tip clearances (TC) cannot be reduced to any amount and minimum values might be necessary for safety reasons, the TC ratios of the last stages can reach values notably higher than current norms. This can be intensified by a compressor running in transient operations where thermal differences can lead to further growing clearances. For decades, the detrimental effects of large clearances on an axial compressor's operating range and efficiency are known and investigated. The ability of circumferential casing grooves in the rotor casing to improve the compressor's operating range has also been in the focus of research for many years. Their simplicity and ease of installation are one reason for their continuing popularity nowadays, where advanced methods to increase the operating range of an axial compressor are known. In the authors' previous paper, three different circumferential groove casing treatments were investigated in a single-stage environment in the low-speed axial research compressor at TU Dresden. One of these grooves was able to notably improve the operating range and the efficiency of the single stage compressor at very large rotor TC (5% of chord length). In this paper, the results of tests with this particular groove type in a three stage environment in the low-speed axial research compressor are presented. Two different rotor TC sizes of 1.2% and 5% of tip chord length were investigated. At the small TC, the grooves are almost neutral. Only small reductions in total pressure ratio and efficiency compared to the solid wall can be observed. If the compressor runs with large TC, it notably benefits from the casing grooves. Both, total pressure and efficiency can be improved by the grooves in a similar extent as in single stage tests. Five-hole probe measurements and unsteady wall pressure measurements show the influence of the groove on the flow field. With the help of numerical investigations, the different behavior of the grooves at the two TC sizes will be discussed.

summary_zh: 本文实验和数值研究了周向槽机匣处理对低速轴流压气机不同叶尖间隙（1.2%和5%弦长）下性能的影响。结果表明，大间隙时机匣处理显著提升总压比和效率，小间隙时几乎中性。通过五孔探针和壁面非定常压力测量分析了流场影响。
method: 实验测量（五孔探针、非定常壁面压力）与数值模拟结合，研究单级和三级环境下两种叶尖间隙（1.2%和5%弦长）的周向槽机匣处理。
innovation: 系统对比了不同叶尖间隙下同一周向槽机匣处理在单级和三级环境中的效果，揭示了间隙大小对机匣处理有效性的关键影响。
conclusions: 大间隙（5%弦长）时，周向槽机匣处理显著改善总压比和效率，效果与单级测试类似；小间隙（1.2%弦长）时几乎中性，仅略有性能下降。
limitations: 仅针对低速压气机，未涉及高速或跨音速工况；未分析机匣处理对非同步振动的影响。
relevance_reason: 论文研究机匣处理对压气机性能的影响，涉及叶尖泄漏流和近失速扰动，但未直接研究旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Stall Inception in a High-Speed Centrifugal Compressor During Speed Transients
abstract: The inception and evolution of rotating stall in a high-speed centrifugal compressor are characterized during speed transients. Experiments were performed in the single stage centrifugal compressor (SSCC) facility at Purdue University and include speed transients from subidle to full speed at different throttle settings while collecting transient performance data. Results show a substantial difference in the compressor transient performance for accelerations versus decelerations. This difference is associated with the heat transfer between the flow and the hardware. The heat transfer from the hardware to the flow during the decelerations locates the compressor operating condition closer to the surge line and results in a significant reduction in surge margin during decelerations. Additionally, data were acquired from fast-response pressure transducers along the impeller shroud, in the vaneless space, and along the diffuser passages. Two different patterns of flow instabilities, including mild surge and short-length-scale rotating stall, are observed during the decelerations. The instability starts with a small pressure perturbation at the impeller leading edge (LE) and quickly develops into a single-lobe rotating stall burst. The stall cell propagates in the direction opposite of impeller rotation at approximately one-third of the rotor speed. The rotating stall bursts are observed in both the impeller and diffuser, with the largest magnitudes near the diffuser throat. Furthermore, the flow instability develops into a continuous high frequency stall and remains in the fully developed stall condition.

summary_zh: 本研究通过实验表征了高速离心压气机在转速瞬态过程中旋转失速的起始与演化。实验在普渡大学单级离心压气机上进行，涵盖从亚怠速到全速的加速与减速过程。结果表明，减速过程中硬件与流体间的热传递使工作点靠近喘振线，导致喘振裕度显著降低。通过快速响应压力传感器，观察到两种流动失稳模式：轻度喘振和短尺度旋转失速。失速起始于叶轮前缘的小压力扰动，迅速发展为单瓣旋转失速团，以约1/3转子转速反向传播，失速团在叶轮和扩压器中均有出现，在扩压器喉部幅值最大。
method: 实验研究，在单级离心压气机台架上进行转速瞬态实验，采集瞬态性能数据，使用快速响应压力传感器沿叶轮轮罩、无叶空间和扩压器通道测量。
innovation: 揭示了转速瞬态过程中热传递对喘振裕度的显著影响，并详细描述了减速过程中短尺度旋转失速的起始与演化特征。
conclusions: 减速过程中热传递使工作点靠近喘振线，喘振裕度显著降低；旋转失速起始于叶轮前缘小扰动，发展为以约1/3转子转速反向传播的单瓣失速团。
limitations: 仅针对单一离心压气机，未涉及控制方法或机理建模。
relevance_reason: 论文研究旋转失速起始与演化，与RI-NSV机理相关但未直接涉及非同步振动。

title: Measurement and Prediction of Centrifugal Compressor Axial Forces During Surge—Part II: Dynamic Surge Model
abstract: The force acting on centrifugal compressors is an important parameter to be considered throughout the operating life of these turbomachines. When the compressor is operating in surge conditions, these forces can become highly dangerous for the mechanical and aerodynamic structures. This instability is usually avoided in industrial applications, but the antisurge system may not react in time when emergency shutdowns or power failures take place. During these rapid transients, surge can develop, generating unsteady forces which can harm the close clearance components of the compressor. Therefore, the capability to predict the characteristics and the dynamics of these surge forces would allow the estimation of the off-design fatigue cycles produced on these components by surge. Currently, no validated method exists to predict the frequency and amplitude of the surge forces and determine the potential damage of these components. In this paper, a lumped parameter model, developed by using the bond graph approach to predict the dynamic surge fluid-dynamic oscillations, is presented. The model requires the geometry and the steady-state performance maps of the compressor as inputs, together with the piping system configuration characteristics. The simulator is provided with a supplementary tool to estimate the axial force frequency and amplitude, taking into consideration all the contributions to the axial fluid-dynamic thrust, the stiffness-damping of the thrust bearing, and the mass of the rotor. The model was tuned and validated using the test case axial force data from the Southwest Research Institute (SWRI) facility. The model has shown good agreement with the experimental results which implies that it can offer significant information about the severity of a surge event and the quantification of the machine performance losses together with possible damage to the close clearance components. This study is a first important step that can lead to schedule optimization for maintenance and repair activities.

summary_zh: 本文针对离心压缩机喘振时的轴向力动态特性，采用键合图法建立集总参数模型，预测喘振力的频率和幅值。模型以几何和稳态性能图为输入，考虑推力轴承刚度和阻尼，经SWRI实验数据验证，能评估喘振严重性和部件损伤。
method: 采用键合图法建立集总参数动态模型，输入几何、稳态性能图和管道配置，输出轴向力频率和幅值，经实验数据验证。
innovation: 首次提出基于键合图法的喘振轴向力动态预测模型，集成推力轴承刚度和阻尼，实现喘振力频率和幅值的定量预测。
conclusions: 模型与SWRI实验数据吻合良好，能有效预测喘振轴向力动态特性，为维护计划优化提供依据。
limitations: 模型依赖稳态性能图，可能不适用于快速瞬变工况；仅针对特定离心压缩机验证。
relevance_reason: 论文研究喘振轴向力预测，与RI-NSV机理、预测或控制无直接关联，但喘振模型对稳定性建模有参考价值。

title: Aerodynamic Influence of Oscillating Adjacent Airfoils in a Linear Compressor Cascade
abstract: Turbomachinery aeroelasticity is gaining renewed interest in the light of current trends, which tend toward thinner blade designs that are not only highly loaded, but also have minimal weight. This necessitates studies of many unsteady aerodynamic phenomena that now occur in acute forms. The present paper investigates the aerodynamic influence of vibrating blades in a compressor cascade using a two-dimensional cascade of airfoils subjected to controlled oscillation. In particular, the pressure distribution and moment on a given airfoil, when its two neighboring airfoils are oscillating sinusoidally at specified phase-difference angles, are investigated. The experimental results are used to establish the relation between the pressure field experienced by the central airfoil and the phase difference between the oscillating blades. The computational results are used additionally to study the secondary phenomenon of flow separation observed when the pressure distribution is such that the local flow incidence to the stationary airfoil is increased. Both the effects are examined quantitatively from the point of the flow being governed by the axial pressure gradient, showing how the geometry of the boundaries, together with the localized flow accelerations, can affect the global flowfield to cause varying amplitudes and phases of unsteadiness in the load.
affiliations: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur
Indian Institute of Technology, Kanpur, Kanpur 208 016, Uttar Pradesh, India
summary_zh: 本文通过二维线性压气机叶栅实验与数值模拟，研究相邻叶片振荡对中心叶片气动力的影响。重点分析了振荡叶片间相位差对中心叶片压力分布和力矩的作用，并探讨了流动分离等二次现象，揭示了轴向压力梯度与边界几何对非定常载荷幅值和相位的影响。
method: 二维线性压气机叶栅实验，相邻叶片受控正弦振荡，改变相位差；辅以数值模拟分析流动分离。
innovation: 系统量化了相邻叶片振荡相位差对中心叶片非定常气动力的影响，并揭示了轴向压力梯度与边界几何对全局流场的调控作用。
conclusions: 相邻叶片振荡相位差显著改变中心叶片压力分布和力矩；局部流动加速和边界几何可导致非定常载荷幅值和相位变化。
limitations: 仅考虑二维叶栅和相邻叶片振荡，未涉及三维效应及旋转不稳定性。
tags: 风扇/压气机叶片气动弹性
relevance_reason: 研究叶片振荡对气动力的影响，属于气动弹性范畴，但未直接涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Potential of Variable-Geometry Method for Compressor Range Extension for Turbocharged Engines
abstract: Increasingly stringent requirements on fuel economy and emissions are propelling turbocharging technology to improve the power density of engines. In the future, turbocharged engines with ultrahigh-power density must be equipped with high-pressure compressors. However, the narrow stable operating range of a compressor at a high-pressure ratio is always a restriction. The variable-geometry method, which refers to the combination of a variable-inlet prewhirl and variable diffuser vanes in this paper, will be a preferred choice for the range extension of compressors, and so estimating its potential for range extension is of long-term value. This paper investigated the performance of a centrifugal compressor adopting the variable-geometry method via a steady three-dimensional Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes simulation. The combination of variable diffuser vanes, ranging from to 10 deg, and a variable-inlet prewhirl, ranging from to 60 deg, has the potential to improve the stable operating range from 23.5 to 63.0% at a pressure ratio of 4.8. The corresponding increase in the low-end engine torque is estimated to be 53%. The combination shows advantages in terms of operating range and efficiency performance over only adjusting the diffuser vanes or simply changing the inlet prewhirl. The contributions from the variable-inlet prewhirl and variable diffuser vanes to the shifts of the surge line and choke line are discussed as well.
affiliations: Tsinghua University
State Key Laboratory of Automotive Safety and Energy, Tsinghua University, 100084 Beijing, People’s Republic of China
State Key Laboratory of Automotive Safety and Energy, Tsinghua University, 100084 Beijing, People's Republic of China
summary_zh: 本文通过稳态三维RANS模拟，研究了可变几何方法（可变进口预旋与可变扩压器叶片组合）对离心压气机稳定工作范围的扩展潜力。在压比4.8下，该方法将稳定工作范围从23.5%提升至63.0%，并估计低端发动机扭矩增加53%。
method: 采用稳态三维RANS数值模拟，研究可变进口预旋（0-60°）与可变扩压器叶片（-10°至10°）组合对离心压气机性能的影响。
innovation: 首次系统评估可变进口预旋与可变扩压器叶片组合对高压比离心压气机稳定范围的扩展潜力，并定量分析各自对喘振线和阻塞线的贡献。
conclusions: 可变几何方法在压比4.8下将稳定工作范围从23.5%扩展到63.0%，低端扭矩增加53%；组合方法优于单独调节扩压器或进口预旋。
limitations: 仅基于稳态RANS模拟，未考虑非定常效应及旋转不稳定性等流动失稳机理。
relevance_reason: 论文研究压气机稳定范围扩展，涉及喘振线移动，但未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Axial Compressor Stall, Circumferential Groove Casing Treatment, and the Tip-Clearance Momentum Flux
abstract: The stall margin and pressure ratio of an axial compressor can both be increased with the use of circumferential groove casing treatments over the rotor. Performance and stall point measurements were obtained in a single-stage high-speed axial compressor with seven different casing treatment configurations. The different configurations were designed to investigate the effects of the number and placement of circumferential grooves. The results demonstrated that the stall margin extension caused by individual grooves could be added together to obtain the value obtained with the equivalent multigroove configuration. Furthermore, the relationship between stall margin extension and the tip-clearance momentum flux was considered. A Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes computational solution from the smooth-wall configuration was used to obtain the momentum flux of the reverse flow at the tip. The results showed a linear relationship between the measured stall extension and the computed smooth-wall momentum flux integrated over the region occupied by the grooves.

summary_zh: 本文实验研究了高速单级轴流压气机中周向槽机匣处理对失速裕度和压比的影响，发现单个槽的失速裕度扩展可叠加得到多槽效果，并揭示了失速裕度扩展与叶尖间隙动量通量之间的线性关系。
method: 实验测量七种机匣处理构型的性能和失速点，结合光滑壁面RANS数值模拟计算叶尖反向流动动量通量。
innovation: 首次建立失速裕度扩展与叶尖间隙动量通量的线性关系，并验证了单个槽效果的叠加性。
conclusions: 1. 单个周向槽的失速裕度扩展可线性叠加得到多槽效果。2. 失速裕度扩展与光滑壁面计算得到的叶尖动量通量在槽覆盖区域积分值呈线性关系。
limitations: 仅针对单级高速压气机，未涉及多级或低速情况；未直接研究旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。
relevance_reason: 论文研究机匣处理对失速裕度的影响，与叶尖泄漏流相关，但未直接涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Three-Dimensional Aeroelastic Solutions via the Nonlinear Frequency-Domain Method
abstract: An aeroelastic solver is developed using a nonlinear frequency domain flow solver coupled to a plate-bending finite element linear structural solver. A methodology for determining the flow conditions leading to flutter and limit-cycle oscillations is proposed, based on a root-finding Newton–Raphson iterative method. The novelty of the approach lies in the constant size of the Newton–Raphson system of equations, regardless of the number of degrees of freedom of the structural model. To serve this purpose, a new method of computing mesh velocities for nonlinear frequency-domain flow solvers is developed, and a technique for solving the geometric conservation law within the nonlinear frequency-domain framework is presented accordingly. The new approach for computing mesh velocities is validated against existing experimental data on the Lockheed, Air Force, NASA and Netherlands wing (run 73, CT5), whereas the aeroelastic solver is validated via experimental results of the AGARD I.-wing weakened model 3 and solid model 2 in air and R-12, respectively. The proposed framework is expected to perform limit-cycle oscillation computations an order of magnitude faster than a typical aeroelastic time-marching approach.
affiliations: McGill University
McGill University, Montreal, Quebec H3A 0C3, Canada
summary_zh: 该研究开发了一种基于非线性频域流场求解器与板弯曲有限元线性结构求解器耦合的气动弹性求解器，提出利用牛顿-拉夫逊迭代法确定颤振和极限环振荡的流动条件。新方法的关键在于牛顿-拉夫逊方程组的大小不随结构模型自由度变化，并发展了非线性频域框架下的网格速度计算和几何守恒律求解技术。通过实验数据验证了网格速度计算方法，气动弹性求解器则通过AGARD机翼模型验证。该框架预计比传统时域方法快一个数量级。
method: 数值方法：非线性频域流场求解器耦合板弯曲有限元线性结构求解器，采用牛顿-拉夫逊迭代法寻找颤振和极限环振荡条件。验证工况：Lockheed、AFN机翼（run 73, CT5）及AGARD机翼模型。
innovation: 牛顿-拉夫逊方程组大小恒定，不随结构自由度增加；发展了非线性频域框架下的网格速度计算和几何守恒律求解技术，显著提升极限环振荡计算效率。
conclusions: 1. 新网格速度计算方法在Lockheed、AFN机翼上得到实验验证。2. 气动弹性求解器在AGARD机翼模型上验证有效，预计极限环振荡计算速度比时域方法快一个数量级。
limitations: 仅针对机翼结构，未涉及旋转机械如风扇/压气机；未考虑非同步振动或旋转不稳定性。
tags: 叶片流致振动预测模型
relevance_reason: 论文研究气动弹性求解器，涉及颤振和极限环振荡，但未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动，与RI-NSV机理、预测或控制间接相关。

title: Aerodynamic Optimization of a Single-Stage Axial Compressor with Stator Shroud Air Injection
abstract: The effects of stator shroud air injection on aerodynamic performance were investigated for a single-stage axial compressor. Multiobjective optimization of the air injector was performed to maximize the enhancements of the peak adiabatic efficiency and stall margin using three-dimensional Reynolds-averaged Navier–Stokes equations. The numerical results for adiabatic efficiency and the total pressure ratio were validated with experimental data for a smooth casing. The design variables were determined through a parametric study as the axial distance between stator leading edge and the injector, the radius of the injector surface curvature, the circumferential coverage of the injector, and the injection mass flow rate. The peak adiabatic efficiency and stall margin were selected as the objective functions. Kriging models were constructed using objective function values calculated at 45 design points, which were selected by Latin hypercube sampling to approximate the objective functions. The performances of two different optimization algorithms were compared. The optimization results showed that an efficiency-oriented optimum design presented an increase of 2.47% in the peak adiabatic efficiency when compared with the compressor with a smooth casing, whereas a stall margin-oriented optimum design showed an increase of 1.13% in the stall margin.
affiliations: Inha University
Inha University, Incheon 22212, Republic of Korea
summary_zh: 针对单级轴流压气机，研究了静子机匣喷气对气动性能的影响。采用三维RANS方程进行多目标优化，以峰值绝热效率和失速裕度为优化目标，通过Kriging模型和拉丁超立方采样构建近似模型。优化后，效率导向设计使峰值绝热效率提升2.47%，失速裕度导向设计使失速裕度提升1.13%。
method: 三维RANS数值模拟，结合拉丁超立方采样、Kriging代理模型和多目标优化算法，实验验证光滑机匣工况。
innovation: 首次对静子机匣喷气进行多目标优化，同时考虑效率和失速裕度，并对比不同优化算法。
conclusions: 1. 效率导向优化使峰值绝热效率提升2.47%；2. 失速裕度导向优化使失速裕度提升1.13%。
limitations: 仅针对单级压气机，未考虑非定常效应及旋转不稳定性。
relevance_reason: 论文研究机匣喷气对失速裕度的影响，属于流动控制范畴，但未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Pressure Flowfield and Inlet Flow Distortion Metrics Reconstruction from Velocity Data
abstract: Complex engine intakes are susceptible to unsteady flow distortions that may compromise the propulsion system operability. Hence, the need for high spatial and temporal resolution flow information is essential to aid the development of distortion-tolerant closely coupled propulsion systems. Stereoscopic particle image velocimetry methods have been successfully applied to these flows, offering synchronous velocity datasets of high spatial resolution across the aerodynamic interface plane. However, the total pressure distortion measurements are still typically provided by low bandwidth intrusive total pressure rakes of low spatial resolution, which results in limited characterization of the total pressure distortion. This limitation can potentially be addressed by pressure field reconstruction from non-intrusive high resolution velocity data. A range of reconstruction methods is assessed based on representative data from steady and unsteady computational simulations of an S-duct configuration. In addition to the reconstructed total pressure field, the impact on the key distortion metrics is assessed. The effect of the Mach number is considered. Overall, the reconstruction methods show that the distortion metrics can be determined with sufficient accuracy to indicate that there is a potential benefit from exploiting high resolution velocity measurements in evaluating total pressure distortion.
affiliations: Cranfield University
Cranfield University, Cranfield, England MK43 0AL, United Kingdom
summary_zh: 该研究针对复杂发动机进气道中的非定常畸变流动，评估了从高分辨率速度数据（如立体PIV）重建总压场及畸变指标的方法。基于S形进气道稳态与非稳态CFD模拟数据，比较了多种重建方法，并考虑了马赫数影响。结果表明，重建方法能以足够精度确定畸变指标，有望利用高分辨率速度测量评估总压畸变。
method: 数值仿真（稳态与非稳态CFD模拟S形进气道），评估多种压力场重建方法，考虑马赫数影响。
innovation: 提出利用非接触高分辨率速度数据（如立体PIV）重建总压畸变场，替代传统低空间分辨率总压耙测量，提高畸变表征能力。
conclusions: 1. 基于速度数据的压力重建方法能以足够精度确定畸变指标。2. 高分辨率速度测量在评估总压畸变方面具有潜在优势。
limitations: 仅基于S形进气道CFD数据，未涉及真实实验验证；未考虑复杂畸变类型如旋转不稳定性的影响。
relevance_reason: 论文研究进气道畸变测量方法，与风扇/压气机RI-NSV无直接关联，但畸变进气可能影响叶片振动，具有间接参考价值。

title: Numerical Investigation of Compressor Blades Deformation During Stall Development into Surge
abstract: The present paper focuses on the simulations of the flow behavior and the structural analysis for a high-speed compressor at the transition time between stall and surge. Two cases are presented; the first case is for the compressor with its original design unchanged, and the other case is for the compressor controlled with air injection at the vaneless area. The case of the compressor with air injection was studied aerodynamically and discussed in detail in a previously published paper done by the authors of the current presented work. Results showed that the stall effect is relatively higher at the impeller exit near the shroud surface due to the interaction between the main flow and the secondary flow, which causes strong pressure and velocity fluctuations at this area. Results also indicated that the forces and moments for the case of the controlled compressor are lower than those for the uncontrolled compressor during stall and surge. The blades tip surface deflection is maximized at the moment of the maximum pressure in the surge cycle, and the most dangerous region at the deformed blades tip surface is located at the transition area between the axial and radial blade profile. Results also showed that the deformation of the blades at the tip region can be limited by changing the shaft bearing stiffness.
affiliations: Cairo University
Cairo University, Giza 12613, Egypt
University of British Columbia
University of British Columbia, Vancouver, British Columbia V6T 1Z4, Canada
summary_zh: 本文数值模拟了高速压气机从失速发展到喘振过程中叶片的变形。研究了原始设计和无叶区喷气控制两种工况，发现失速效应在叶轮出口靠近机匣处较强，控制工况下叶片受力和力矩较小。叶片尖端变形在喘振循环压力最大时达到峰值，最危险区域位于轴向与径向叶片型面过渡区，改变轴轴承刚度可限制尖端变形。
method: 数值仿真，采用流固耦合方法模拟高速压气机失速到喘振过渡过程，对比原始设计与无叶区喷气控制两种工况。
innovation: 首次在失速到喘振过渡过程中同时分析叶片变形和流动行为，并评估喷气控制对叶片受力和变形的影响。
conclusions: 1. 失速效应在叶轮出口靠近机匣处最强，导致强压力和速度脉动。2. 叶片尖端变形在喘振循环最大压力时刻达到峰值，最危险区域在轴向与径向叶片型面过渡区。
limitations: 仅针对单一高速压气机，未考虑不同转速或几何参数的影响，且控制方法仅限于无叶区喷气。
tags: 叶片流致振动抑制/控制
relevance_reason: 论文研究失速到喘振过程中的叶片变形，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但涉及压气机流动失稳和叶片振动控制，对理解流致振动有参考价值。

title: A high-order model of rotating stall in axial compressors with inlet distortion
abstract: In this paper, a high-order distortion model is proposed for analyzing the rotating stall inception process induced by inlet distortion in axial compressors. A distortion-generating screen in the compressor inlet is considered. By assuming a quadratic function for the local flow total pressure-drop, the existing Mansoux model is extended to include the effects of static inlet distortion, and a new high-order distortion model is derived. To illustrate the effectiveness of the distortion model, numerical simulations are performed on an eighteenth-order model. It is demonstrated that long length-scale disturbances emerge out of the distorted background flow, and further induce the onset of rotating stall in advance. In addition, the circumferential non-uniform distribution and time evolution of the axial flow are also shown to be consistent with the existing features. It is thus shown that the high-order distortion model is capable of describing the transient behavior of stall inception and will contribute further to stall detection under inlet distortion.

summary_zh: 本文提出一种高阶畸变模型，用于分析轴流压气机中由进气畸变诱发的旋转失速起始过程。通过假设局部流动总压降为二次函数，扩展了Mansoux模型以包含静态进气畸变效应。对十八阶模型进行数值模拟，表明长尺度扰动从畸变背景流中产生并提前诱发旋转失速，轴向流动的周向非均匀分布和时间演化与现有特征一致。
method: 数值仿真，采用十八阶高阶畸变模型，考虑进气畸变筛网，假设局部总压降为二次函数。
innovation: 将Mansoux模型扩展至包含静态进气畸变效应，提出高阶畸变模型，能够描述畸变条件下失速起始的瞬态行为。
conclusions: 长尺度扰动从畸变背景流中产生并提前诱发旋转失速；轴向流动的周向非均匀分布和时间演化与现有特征一致。
limitations: 仅针对静态进气畸变，未考虑动态畸变或旋转不稳定性；模型阶数有限。
relevance_reason: 论文研究进气畸变下的旋转失速，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但失速机理对理解压气机流动不稳定性有参考价值。

title: Experimental and numerical study of tip injection in a subsonic axial flow compressor
abstract: Parametric study of tip injection was implemented experimentally on a subsonic axial flow compressor to understand the underlying flow mechanisms of stability improvement of the compressor with discrete tip injection. Injector throat height varied from 2 to 6 times the height of rotor tip clearance, and circumferential coverage percentage ranged from 8.3% to 25% of the annulus. Static pressure fluctuations over the rotor tip were measured with fast-response pressure transducers. Whole-passage time-accurate simulations were also carried out to help us understand the flow details. The combinations of tip injection with traditional casing treatments were experimentally studied to generate an engineering-acceptable method of compressor stall control. The results indicate that the maximum stability improvement is achieved when injectors are choked despite their different sizes. The effect of circumferential coverage percentage on compressor stability depends on the value of injector throat height for un-choked injectors, and vice versa. Tip blockage in the blade passage is greatly reduced by the choked injectors, which is the primary reason for stability enhancement. The accomplishment of blockage diminishment is maintained in the circumferential direction with the unsteady effect of tip injection, which manifests as a hysteresis between the recovery of tip blockage and the recovery of tip leakage vortex. The unsteady effect is primarily responsible for the effectiveness of tip injection with a partial circumferential coverage. Tip injection cannot enhance the stability of the rotor with axial slots significantly, but it can improve the stability of the rotor with circumferential grooves further. The combined structure of tip injection with circumferential grooves is an alternative for engineering application.

summary_zh: 通过实验和数值方法研究了亚声速轴流压气机中离散叶尖射流对稳定性的影响，发现射流壅塞时稳定性提升最大，主要机制是减少叶尖堵塞，且部分周向覆盖的射流存在非定常效应，与周向槽组合具有工程应用潜力。
method: 实验测量（快速响应压力传感器）和全通道非定常数值模拟，参数包括射流喉部高度（2-6倍叶尖间隙）和周向覆盖率（8.3%-25%）。
innovation: 系统研究了射流壅塞与非壅塞状态对稳定性的影响，揭示了部分周向覆盖射流的非定常效应（堵塞恢复滞后），并探索了射流与机匣处理的组合效果。
conclusions: 射流壅塞时稳定性提升最大，主要原因是叶尖堵塞显著减少；部分周向覆盖射流的非定常效应（堵塞恢复滞后）是其有效性的关键。
limitations: 未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动，仅关注失速裕度提升。
relevance_reason: 论文研究叶尖射流对压气机稳定性的影响，涉及叶尖泄漏流和堵塞，与旋转不稳定性相关但未直接研究NSV。

title: Effects of Radial Loading Distribution on Partial-Surge-Initiated Instability in a Transonic Axial Flow Compressor
abstract: Partial surge is a new type of instability inception in the form of axisymmetric low-frequency disturbance located in the hub region and has been observed in transonic axial flow compressors. Previous studies on the evolution of instability in a transonic axial flow compressor at different rotor speeds found that partial surge occurs and leads to full compressor flow instability at high rotor speeds but not at low rotor speeds, and the blade loading at the hub increases with the rotor speed. A hypothesis is first made that the level of blade loading in the hub region could be highly correlated to the occurrence of partial surge. Experiments and numerical simulations are then conducted to test this hypothesis when the radial distribution of blade loading near the stall point is varied by introducing inlet distortion (i.e., alternately mounting specially designed screens at the inlet of the compressor). Both the experimental results of instability evolution and the numerical results of radial distribution of blade loading show that high hub loading near the stall point is the necessary condition for the occurrence of partial surge. In addition, the general effects of radial loading distribution on the type of stall inception are presented and discussed.

summary_zh: 针对跨声速轴流压气机中轮毂区部分喘振引发的不稳定性，通过实验和数值模拟研究叶片径向载荷分布的影响。发现高轮毂载荷是部分喘振发生的必要条件，并揭示了径向载荷分布对失速起始类型的影响。
method: 实验测量（进口畸变筛网改变径向载荷分布）与数值模拟（RANS/URANS）相结合，研究不同转子转速下失速演化。
innovation: 首次提出并验证轮毂区叶片载荷水平与部分喘振发生的强相关性，通过进口畸变主动改变径向载荷分布。
conclusions: 高轮毂载荷是部分喘振发生的必要条件；径向载荷分布决定失速起始类型（部分喘振或旋转失速）。
limitations: 仅针对特定跨声速压气机，未涉及非定常气动弹性或叶片振动。
relevance_reason: 论文研究失速起始机理（部分喘振），与RI-NSV无直接关联，但为压气机稳定性研究提供参考。

title: Convoluted Intake Distortion Measurements Using Stereo Particle Image Velocimetry
abstract: The unsteady distorted flowfields generated within convoluted aeroengine intakes can compromise the engine performance and operability. Therefore, there is a need for a better understanding of the complex characteristics of the distorted flow at the exit of S-shaped intakes. This work presents a detailed analysis of the unsteady swirl distortion based on synchronous, high-spatial-resolution measurements using stereoscopic particle image velocimetry. Two S-duct configurations with different centerline offsets are investigated. The high-offset duct shows greater levels of dynamic and steady swirl distortion and a notably greater tendency toward bulk swirl patterns associated with high swirl distortion. More discrete distortion patterns with locally high swirl levels and the potential to impact the engine operability are identified. The most energetic coherent structures of the flowfield are observed using proper orthogonal decomposition. A switching mode is identified that promotes the alternating swirl switching mechanism and is mostly associated with the occurrence of potent bulk swirl events. A vertical mode that characterizes a perturbation of the vertical velocity field promotes most of the twin swirl flow distortion topologies. It is postulated that it is associated with the unsteadiness of the centerline shear layer.

summary_zh: 采用立体粒子图像测速技术测量S形进气道出口非定常畸变流场，分析高低偏移量S形管道中的动态涡流畸变特性。通过本征正交分解识别出主导相干结构，包括促进交替涡流切换的切换模态和与中心线剪切层非定常性相关的垂直模态。
method: 实验测量：立体粒子图像测速（SPIV）技术，同步高空间分辨率测量；两种不同中心线偏移量的S形管道构型。
innovation: 首次利用SPIV对S形进气道出口非定常涡流畸变进行高空间分辨率同步测量，并通过POD识别出切换模态和垂直模态等相干结构。
conclusions: 高偏移量管道表现出更强的动态和稳态涡流畸变，且更易产生整体涡流模式；POD识别出切换模态和垂直模态，分别与交替涡流切换和双涡流拓扑相关。
limitations: 仅针对S形进气道，未涉及发动机风扇/压气机叶片响应；未提供定量畸变指标与发动机性能的直接关联。
relevance_reason: 论文研究进气道畸变流场，与风扇/压气机流致振动间接相关，但未涉及RI-NSV机理、预测或控制。

title: Hierarchical Immersed Boundary Method with Smeared Geometry
abstract: This paper presents a low-order model applying the immersed boundary method on smeared geometry. It is thus able to represent the effect of turbomachinery within a complex system. Assessment of this model on the NASA rotor 67 has been made under clean flow conditions. Good agreement has been achieved between the immersed boundary method on smeared geometry model, experiments, and a high-fidelity computational fluids dynamics model. For high-speed conditions, about within 0.5, 1, and 1% agreements are achieved on the pressure ratio, efficiency, and choking flow, respectively, between immersed the boundary method on smeared geometry model and the experiment. The capability of the model capturing the fan’s behavior under inlet distortion has also been assessed under the flow with a level of 10% distortion of the total pressure, which covers a 120 deg sector. The nonuniform work input of the fan, which is one of the key features of the fan–distortion interaction, has been captured by the immersed boundary method on smeared geometry model. Finally, the model also helps to shed light on the physical understanding of fan–distortion interaction. It provides evidence suggesting that the tangential pressure gradient is one of the mechanisms causing the induced nonuniform work input of the fan subjected to the inlet distortion.

summary_zh: 提出一种基于浸入边界法的低阶模型，用于模拟复杂系统中的叶轮机械效应。在NASA转子67上验证，清洁流下与实验和高保真CFD吻合良好（压比、效率、堵塞流量误差分别约0.5%、1%、1%）。模型能捕捉进气畸变下风扇的非均匀做功，并揭示切向压力梯度是导致非均匀做功的机制之一。
method: 数值仿真：采用浸入边界法处理涂抹几何的低阶模型，在NASA转子67上评估，工况包括清洁流和10%总压畸变（120°扇区）。
innovation: 将浸入边界法应用于涂抹几何，构建低阶模型以高效模拟叶轮机械在复杂系统中的行为，并用于分析畸变相互作用机理。
conclusions: 1. 低阶模型在清洁流下与实验误差约0.5%（压比）、1%（效率）、1%（堵塞流量）。2. 模型揭示切向压力梯度是畸变引起风扇非均匀做功的机制之一。
limitations: 仅评估了单一转子（NASA转子67）和特定畸变模式，未涉及非同步振动或旋转不稳定性。
relevance_reason: 论文研究畸变进气下风扇行为，与RI-NSV无直接关联，但畸变可能诱发非同步振动，具有间接参考价值。

title: Solution Stabilization and Convergence Acceleration for the Harmonic Balance Equation System
abstract: This paper presents an efficient approach for stabilizing solution and accelerating convergence of a harmonic balance equation system for an efficient analysis of turbomachinery unsteady flows due to flutter and blade row interaction. The proposed approach combines the Runge–Kutta method with the lower upper symmetric Gauss Seidel (LU-SGS) method and the block Jacobi method. The LU-SGS method, different from its original application as an implicit time marching scheme, is used as an implicit residual smoother with under-relaxation, allowing big Courant–Friedrichs–Lewy (CFL) numbers (in the order of hundreds), leading to significant convergence speedup. The block Jacobi method is introduced to implicitly integrate the time spectral source term of a harmonic balance equation system, in order to reduce the complexity of the direct implicit time integration by the LU-SGS method. The implicit treatment of the time spectral source term thus greatly augments the stability region of a harmonic balance equation system in the case of grid-reduced frequency well above ten. Validation of the harmonic balance flow solver was carried out using linear cascade test data. Flutter analysis of a transonic rotor and blade row interaction analyses for a transonic compressor stage were presented to demonstrate the stabilization and acceleration effect by the combination of the LU-SGS and the block Jacobi methods. The influence of the number of Jacobi iterations on solution stabilization is also investigated, showing that two Jacobi iterations are sufficient for stability purpose, which is much more efficient than existing methods of its kind in the open literature.

summary_zh: 本文提出一种结合LU-SGS与块Jacobi方法的谐波平衡方程求解稳定与加速技术，用于叶轮机械非定常流动（颤振、叶排干涉）分析。LU-SGS作为隐式残差光顺器允许大CFL数（数百），块Jacobi隐式积分时间谱源项，显著增强高频（网格折合频率>10）稳定性。通过线性叶栅、跨声速转子颤振及压气机级叶排干涉验证，两轮Jacobi迭代即可满足稳定性。
method: 数值仿真：谐波平衡法结合LU-SGS隐式残差光顺与块Jacobi隐式时间谱源项积分，CFL数达数百，网格折合频率>10。
innovation: 将LU-SGS从时间推进改为隐式残差光顺，并引入块Jacobi方法隐式处理时间谱源项，大幅提升高频稳定性与收敛速度。
conclusions: 1. LU-SGS与块Jacobi组合使CFL数达数百，收敛加速显著；2. 两轮Jacobi迭代即可保证稳定性，优于现有方法。
limitations: 仅验证了线性叶栅和两个算例，未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动等复杂现象。
tags: 风扇/压气机叶片气动弹性
relevance_reason: 论文研究颤振与叶排干涉的谐波平衡求解加速，属于气动弹性范畴，但未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动。

title: Rotating Blade Stall Maps Measured by Differential Infrared Thermography
abstract: RAFFEL and Merz [1] demonstrated the feasibility of unsteady boundary-layer transition detection by differential infrared thermography (DIT), a method whereby the difference of two sequentially recorded infrared images is analyzed to extract the point of greatest difference between the flows, which, for attached flows, is equivalent to the transition position. For flows with dynamic flow separation, the strongest feature in the infrared difference images is no longer the transition, but the separation of the flow. Gardner and Richter [2] showed that the standard deviation of pressure measurements at the transition point has a small peak, but that separated flow results in an even larger peak. Similarly, the infrared images can be analyzed to extract the presence and extent of separated flowover an airfoil. DIT offers a great advantage over using pressure sensors as indicators for separated flow because DIT does not require any special equipment to be attached to or built into the model observed. The major aim of the investigations presented here is the generation of “stall maps” in which stalled areas in the rotor plane are geometrically described. Currently, these maps are often produced through the investigation of pressure sensor data from sensors integrated into the rotor blades [3]. Alternatives are the use of tuft visualization [4] or pressure-sensitive paint [5]. However, these techniques require installations or coatings on the rotor blades, which can be avoided by the technique described in the following

summary_zh: 本文采用差分红外热成像（DIT）技术测量旋转叶片上的失速区域，生成失速图谱。该方法通过分析红外图像差异检测流动分离，无需在叶片上安装传感器或涂层，为转子平面失速区域几何描述提供了非接触式替代方案。
method: 实验方法：差分红外热成像（DIT），通过比较连续红外图像差异提取流动分离位置，用于旋转叶片失速图谱生成。
innovation: 创新点：利用DIT非接触式检测流动分离，避免了传统压力传感器、毛束或压敏涂层的安装需求，简化了旋转叶片失速区域的测量。
conclusions: 1. DIT可有效检测旋转叶片上的流动分离，生成失速图谱。2. 与压力传感器数据相比，DIT无需叶片集成设备，具有操作简便优势。
limitations: 可能受限于红外相机分辨率及旋转叶片表面温度变化对分离检测精度的影响。
relevance_reason: 论文关注失速图谱测量，与RI-NSV机理无直接关联，但失速区域检测对理解近失速扰动有参考价值。

title: Characterizing Flow Effects of Ported Shroud Casing Treatment on Centrifugal Compressor Performance
abstract: This paper presents an investigation of the effects of ported shroud (PS) self-recirculating casing treatment used in turbocharger centrifugal compressors for increasing the operable range. The investigation consists of computing three-dimensional flow in a representative centrifugal compressor with and without PS at various levels of approximations in flow physics and geometrical configuration; this provides an enabler for establishing the causal link between PS flow effects and compressor performance changes. It is shown that the main flow path perceives the PS flow as a combination of flow actuations that include injection and removal of mass flow and injection of axial momentum and tangential momentum. A computational model in which the presence of the PS is replaced by imposed boundary conditions (BCs) that reflect the individual flow actuations has thus been formulated and implemented. The removal of a fraction of the inducer mass flow has been determined to be the dominant flow actuation in setting the performance of PS compressors. Mass flow removal reduces the flow blockage associated with the impeller tip leakage flow and increases the diffusion in the main flow path. Adding swirl to the injected flow in the direction opposite to the wheel rotation results in an increase of the stagnation pressure ratio and a decrease of the efficiency. The loss generation in the flow path has been defined to rationalize efficiency changes associated with PS compressor operation.

summary_zh: 本文通过三维数值模拟研究了带端口护罩（PS）自循环机匣处理的离心压气机性能，发现PS的主要效应是诱导器质量流量的移除，这减少了叶尖泄漏流引起的堵塞并增加了主流的扩散。注入与叶轮旋转方向相反的旋流会提高总压比但降低效率。
method: 采用三维数值模拟（CFD），对比有无PS的离心压气机，并通过边界条件模拟PS的流动效应（质量流移除、动量注入）。
innovation: 将PS效应分解为质量流移除、轴向和切向动量注入等独立流动激励，并建立边界条件模型以隔离各效应的影响。
conclusions: 1. 质量流移除是PS影响性能的主导机制，可减少叶尖泄漏流堵塞。2. 反向旋流注入提高总压比但降低效率。
limitations: 仅基于数值模拟，缺乏实验验证；未涉及非定常流动或旋转不稳定性。
relevance_reason: 研究机匣处理对压气机性能的影响，涉及叶尖泄漏流和流动控制，与RI-NSV的流动控制相关但未直接研究NSV。

title: End-Wall Boundary Layers and Blockages of Multistage Axial Compressors Under Different Conditions
abstract: End-wall boundary layers and induced blockages are important factors for multistage axial compressors’ performance. This paper investigates hub and shroud end-wall boundary layers, and the corresponding blockages of a five-stage axial compressor under different conditions. The results show that the hub displacement thickness increases from the front to rear stage, whereas the shroud displacement thickness remains almost the same. At the design point, the blockage increases from 2.4% for the front stage to 14.7% for the rear stage, which is dominated by the hub displacement thickness. Under different operating conditions of 100% speed, the blockage is almost the same for the front stage, but increases significantly for the rear stage from 6.0% at near choke to 22.2% at near surge. At peak-efficiency points of different rotational speeds, the blockage remains almost the same. The steady and unsteady results show almost the same trends of displacement thickness and blockage. Compared to unsteady simulations, the time consumption of steady simulations is only one-sixtieth, which can save large amounts of computational resources. Based on the results, the trends of displacement thicknesses and blockages are almost the same in a wide range of operating conditions, which indicates that the flow control in the end-wall region for the design condition would be still effective.

State Key Laboratory of Automotive Safety and Energy, Tsinghua University, 100084 Beijing, People's Republic of China
summary_zh: 本文通过稳态和瞬态数值模拟，研究了五级轴流压气机在不同工况下端壁边界层位移厚度和堵塞的变化规律。结果表明，轮毂位移厚度从前向后级增加，而机匣位移厚度基本不变；设计点堵塞从前级的2.4%增至后级的14.7%，近喘点后级堵塞达22.2%。稳态模拟与瞬态结果趋势一致，计算时间仅为后者的1/60。
method: 采用稳态和瞬态数值模拟，研究五级轴流压气机在100%转速不同工况及不同转速峰值效率点的端壁边界层与堵塞特性。
innovation: 系统揭示了多级压气机前后级端壁堵塞的差异及其随工况的变化规律，并验证了稳态模拟在趋势预测上的高效性。
conclusions: 1. 设计点堵塞从前级2.4%增至后级14.7%，主要由轮毂位移厚度主导。2. 近喘点后级堵塞达22.2%，而前级堵塞基本不变。
limitations: 仅针对五级压气机，未涉及非定常流动失稳机理及控制方法。
relevance_reason: 论文研究端壁堵塞与失速相关，但未涉及旋转不稳定性或非同步振动，属于近失速流动现象。

title: Numerical Study on Aeroelastic Instability for a Low-Speed Fan
abstract: Over recent years, engine designs have moved increasingly toward low specific thrust cycles to deliver significant specific fuel consumption (SFC) improvements. Such fan blades may be more prone to aerodynamic and aeroelastic instabilities than conventional fan blades. The aim of this paper is to analyze the flutter stability of a low-speed/low pressure ratio fan blade. By using a validated computational fluid dynamics (CFD) model (AU3D), three-dimensional unsteady simulations are performed for a modern low-speed fan rig for which extensive measured data are available. The computational domain contains a complete fan assembly with an intake duct and the downstream outlet guide vanes (OGVs), which is a whole low-pressure (LP) domain. Flutter simulations are conducted over a range of speeds to understand flutter characteristics of this blade. Only the first flap (1F) mode is considered in this work. Measured rig data obtained by using the same fan set but with two different lengths of the intake showed a significant difference in the flutter boundary for the two intakes. AU3D computations were performed for both intakes and were used to explain this difference between the two intakes, and showed that intake reflections play an important role in flutter of this blade. This observation indicates that the experiment with the long intake used for the performance test may be misleading for flutter. In the next phase of this work, two possible modifications for increasing the flutter margin of the fan blade were explored: changing the mode shape of the blade and using acoustic liners in the casing. The results show that it is possible to increase the flutter margin of the blade by either decreasing the ratio of the twisting to plunging motion in 1F mode or by introducing deep acoustic liners in the intake. The liners have to be deep enough to attenuate the flutter pressure waves and hence influence the stability. The results indicate the importance of reflection in flutter stability of the fan blade and clearly show that intake duct needs to be included in flutter study of any fan blade.
